---
title: "DEFINE-UK V1.0"
author: "Adam George"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document: default
  word_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path))
```

```{r clean_env, include=FALSE}
rm(list=setdiff(ls(all=TRUE), c("bbf","bbfq", "bbs", "bbsq" , "ea","boe_rate","lms","mydata","var_names","mybase")))
gc()
```

# Model Control Panel

```{r control_panel}

Sim_Start <- 2023 # Simulation start date
Sim_End   <- 2041 # Simulation end date
T <- (Sim_End - Sim_Start) * 4 # Number of periods (quarters) to run the model
Scenarios <- 1:9  # Scenarios to run (1-9 available, see scenario_config below)
result_tables  <- 1 # Set to 1 to generate Excel output tables
make_plots     <- 1 # Set to 1 to generate result plots
validation     <- 0 # Set to 1 to generate validation plots
latex          <- 0 # Set to 1 to generate LaTeX tables (requires: result_tables <- 1)
run_sensitivity <- 0 # Set to 1 to run sensitivity analysis tables (slow: ~15+ full model runs)

# ---- Input Directory ----
dir_input      <- "input"              # Source data files (Excel)

# ---- Output Directories ----
dir_plots      <- "output/plots"       # Scenario comparison charts
dir_validation <- "output/validation"  # Validation plots and RDS files
dir_latex      <- "output/latex"       # LaTeX tables and equations
dir_tables     <- "output/tables"      # CSV data tables


Data_Start <- 1987 # Data start date
Data_End   <- 2022 # Data end date (and initial condition)
L  <- (Data_End - Data_Start + 1) * 4 # Initial data length in quarters
YR <- Data_End - Data_Start + 1        # Number of years in initial data
QR <- YR * 4                           # Number of quarters in data



## Scenario Configuration
# Key scenario parameters (set in model defaults, overridden per scenario):
#   GVT_ENERGY        = Baseline government energy investment switch (1=on)
#   GBE_END     = End period for government energy investment
#   FF_BAN        = Fossil fuel ban switch (1=on)
#   FF_INV_BAN = Period when new fossil fuel investment is banned
#   FF_CAP_BAN   = Period when fossil fuel capital stock must be retired
#   TTRANS      = Length of fossil fuel transition period (quarters)
#   CRED       = Investor credibility in ban credibility (0=no credibility, 1=full)
#   TRANS_PASS  = Transition cost pass-through (1=full)
#   GVT_CRED    = Government credibility adjustment (0 or 1)
#   POWER_SUB        = Power sector subsidy switch (1=on)
#   GVT_INVEST       = Government direct investment switch (1=on-balance-sheet)
#   GREEN_BONDS       = Green bond financing switch (1=on)
#   HIBAN       = Housing improvement ban switch (1=on)
#   HENBAN      = Housing energy efficiency ban switch (1=on)
#   THIBAN      = Period when housing improvement ban starts
#   THENBAN     = Period when housing energy ban starts
#   TTRANSH     = Housing transition period length (quarters)
#   HSELL       = Housing stock turnover rate
#   HOUSING_SUB        = Green housing subsidy switch (1=on)
#   HOUSING_SUB_RATE       = Green housing subsidy rate (e.g. 0.4 = 40%)
#   GREEN_POWER        = Green power capacity addition switch (1=on)
#   ALT_PRICING    = Alternative electricity pricing switch (1=on)
#   CO_NFF      = Crowding-out coefficient for government green investment
#   sh_rGVTNMFIG = Green bond interest rate premium (0=base rate, 1=standard govt rate)

scenario_config <- list(

  # S1: Baseline — no policy intervention
  list(scenario_num = 1, name = "Baseline", start = L+17, end = L+29,
       parameters = function(){
         GVT_ENERGY <<- 1
         GBE_END <<- L+T+1
       },
       colour = "#000000", linetype = "solid", shape = 1, size = 1,
       include_in_plots = TRUE),

  # S2: Fossil fuel ban — ban new FF investment and retire FF capital
  list(scenario_num = 2, name = "Fossil Fuel Ban", start = L+17, end = L+T,
       parameters = function(){
         GVT_ENERGY <<- 1
         FF_BAN <<- 1
         FF_INV_BAN <<- L+17       # Ban new FF investment from 2028
         FF_CAP_BAN <<- L + 37       # FF capital retired by 2033
         GBE_END <<- L+T+1
         GVT_CRED <<- 1
         TTRANS <<- FF_CAP_BAN - (L+21)
         CRED <<- 0.9
         TRANS_PASS <<- 1
       },
       colour = "#009E73", linetype = "dashed", shape = 2, size = 1,
       include_in_plots = TRUE),

  # S3: Power sector subsidy only
  list(scenario_num = 3, name = "Power Sector Subsidy", start = L+17, end = L+T,
       parameters = function(){
         GVT_ENERGY <<- 1
         POWER_SUB <<- 1
         GVT_INVEST <<- 0               # Subsidy off-balance-sheet
         GREEN_BONDS <<- 0               # No green bond financing
         GBE_END <<- L+T+1
       },
       colour = "#D55E00", linetype = "dashed", shape = 3, size = 1,
       include_in_plots = TRUE),

  # S4: Fossil fuel ban combined with power sector subsidy
  list(scenario_num = 4, name = "Fossil Fuel Ban + Subsidy", start = L+17, end = L+T,
       parameters = function(){
         GVT_ENERGY <<- 1
         FF_BAN <<- 1
         FF_INV_BAN <<- L+17
         FF_CAP_BAN <<- L + 37
         GBE_END <<- L+T+1
         TTRANS <<- FF_CAP_BAN - (L+21)
         CRED <<- 0.9
         TRANS_PASS <<- 1
         GVT_CRED <<- 1
         POWER_SUB <<- 1
         GVT_INVEST <<- 0
         GREEN_BONDS <<- 0
       },
       colour = "#1e00f5", linetype = "dashed", shape = 4, size = 1,
       include_in_plots = TRUE),

  # S5: Housing regulation — ban inefficient housing, mandate upgrades
  list(scenario_num = 5, name = "Housing Regulation", start = L+17, end = L+T,
       parameters = function(){
         GVT_ENERGY <<- 1
         GBE_END <<- L+T+1
         HIBAN <<- 1               # Ban inefficient housing investment
         HENBAN <<- 1              # Ban inefficient energy housing
         THIBAN <<- L + 21         # Housing improvement ban from 2028
         THENBAN <<- L + 37        # Housing energy ban from 2033
         TTRANSH <<- THENBAN - THIBAN
         HSELL <<- 0.012           # Housing turnover rate
       },
       colour = "#009E73", linetype = "dashed", shape = 2, size = 1,
       include_in_plots = TRUE),

  # S6: Housing regulation with green housing subsidy
  list(scenario_num = 6, name = "Housing Regulation + Subsidy", start = L+17, end = L+T,
       parameters = function(){
         GVT_ENERGY <<- 1
         GBE_END <<- L+T+1
         HIBAN <<- 1
         HENBAN <<- 1
         THIBAN <<- L + 21
         THENBAN <<- L + 37
         TTRANSH <<- THENBAN - THIBAN
         HSELL <<- 0.012
         HOUSING_SUB <<- 1                # Enable green housing subsidy
         HOUSING_SUB_RATE <<- 0.4             # 40% subsidy rate
       },
       colour = "#D55E00", linetype = "dashed", shape = 3, size = 1,
       include_in_plots = TRUE),

  # S7: Combined — all regulations (FF ban + housing) with subsidies
  list(scenario_num = 7, name = "Both Regulations + Subsidies", start = L+17, end = L+T,
       parameters = function(){
         GVT_ENERGY <<- 1
         GBE_END <<- L+T+1
         # Housing regulation
         HIBAN <<- 1
         HENBAN <<- 1
         THIBAN <<- L + 21
         THENBAN <<- L + 37
         TTRANSH <<- THENBAN - THIBAN
         HSELL <<- 0.012
         HOUSING_SUB <<- 1
         HOUSING_SUB_RATE <<- 0.4
         # Fossil fuel ban
         FF_BAN <<- 1
         FF_INV_BAN <<- L+21
         FF_CAP_BAN <<- L + 37
         TTRANS <<- FF_CAP_BAN - (L+17)
         CRED <<- 0.9
         TRANS_PASS <<- 1
         GVT_CRED <<- 1
         # Power sector subsidy
         POWER_SUB <<- 1
       },
       colour = "#e31925", linetype = "dotted", shape = 5, size = 1,
       include_in_plots = TRUE),

  # S8: Green public investment financed by green bonds
  list(scenario_num = 8, name = "GPI + Green Bonds", start = L+17, end = L+T,
       parameters = function(){
         GVT_ENERGY <<- 1
         GREEN_POWER <<- 1
         ALT_PRICING <<- 0
         GVT_INVEST <<- 1
         GREEN_BONDS <<- 1               # Green bond financing enabled
         CO_NFF <<- 0              # No crowding out of private NFF investment
         sh_rGVTNMFIG <<- 0        # Green bonds at base rate (no risk premium)
         GBE_END <<- L+T+1
       },
       colour = "#1e00f5", linetype = "dashed", shape = 3, size = 1,
       include_in_plots = TRUE),

  # S9: Green power subsidy — same green power spending as S8 but as off-balance-sheet subsidy
  list(scenario_num = 9, name = "Green Power Subsidy", start = L+17, end = L+T,
       parameters = function(){
         GVT_ENERGY <<- 1
         GREEN_POWER <<- 1                # Same green power capacity addition as S8
         ALT_PRICING <<- 0
         GVT_INVEST <<- 0                 # Off-balance-sheet (subsidy to private sector)
         GREEN_BONDS <<- 0
         GBE_END <<- L+T+1
       },
       colour = "#D55E00", linetype = "dotdash", shape = 6, size = 1,
       include_in_plots = TRUE)
)


scenario_config <- scenario_config[Scenarios]

# ---- Chart Configuration ----
chart_configs <- list(
  list(filename ="GCF_GR.png",variable = "GCF_GRPLOT", label = "Total green investment £bn (2022 prices)", legend_x = 0.2,legend_y = 0.9,ymin = 0, ymax = 100),
  list(filename ="plot_emis.png",variable = "EMISPLOT", label = "Total Emissions (MtCO2e)", legend_x = 0.2,legend_y = 0.9,ymin = 0, ymax = 500),
  list(filename ="BETA_ELEC.png",variable = "BETA_ELECPLOT", label = "Proportion of Non-fossil fuel electricity",ymin = 50, ymax = 100, legend_x = 0.2,legend_y = 0.9),
  list(filename ="GDP.png",variable = "GDPPLOT_R", label = "GDP £bn (2022 prices)",ymin = 2000, ymax = 5000, legend_x = 0.2,legend_y = 0.9),
  list(filename ="INF.png",variable = "INFPLOT", label = "CPI Inflation", legend_x = 0.2,legend_y = 0.9,ymin = -2, ymax = 8),
  list(filename ="DEBT_GDP.png",variable = "DEBT_GDP", label = "Public Debt to GDP Ratio (%)", legend_x = 0.2,legend_y = 0.9,ymin = 0, ymax = 200),
  list(filename ="GCF_PSNFFR.png",variable = "GCF_PSNFFRPLOT", label = "Total non-fossil fuel energy investment  £bn (2022 prices)", legend_x = 0.2,legend_y = 0.9,ymin = 0, ymax = 40),
  list(filename ="DEF_PS.png",variable = "DEF_PSPLOT", label = "PS Default rate (%)", legend_x = 0.2,legend_y = 0.9,ymin = 0, ymax = 5),
  list(filename ="DEF_GDP.png", variable = "DEF_GDP", label = "Fiscal Deficit (% of GDP)", legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,ymin = 2.5, ymax = 7.5)
)


# ---- Credibility Cases (for FF ban scenarios S2, S4) ----
# Each case overrides CRED and GVT_CRED after sce$parameters() is applied.
# S1 and S3 are unaffected by CRED/GVT_CRED but appear in every plot for comparison.
credibility_cases <- list(
  list(name = "mutual_trust",           label = "Mutual Trust",           CRED = 0.9, GVT_CRED = 1),
  list(name = "unexpected_enforcement", label = "Unexpected Enforcement",  CRED = 0.3, GVT_CRED = 1, ELEC_BUFFER = 0.05),
  list(name = "poor_credibility",       label = "Poor Credibility",        CRED = 0.3, GVT_CRED = 0),
  list(name = "false_confidence",       label = "False Confidence",        CRED = 0.9, GVT_CRED = 0),
  list(name = "no_forward_guidance",    label = "No Forward Guidance",     CRED = 0.0, GVT_CRED = 1)
)

# ---- Per-Block Chart Configs ----
# Each block has its own list of charts. Edit independently per block.
# ymin/ymax set a preferred window — axes auto-expand if data falls outside.

# FF Credibility block (S1-4 x 5 credibility cases)
# Regulatory policies: electricity mix, emissions, power investment, macro, wage share,
# PS credit rationing, public debt
ff_cred_chart_configs <- list(
  list(filename = "BETA_ELEC.png",    variable = "BETA_ELECPLOT",    label = "Non-fossil fuel electricity share (%)",              legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.15, ymin = 50,   ymax = 100),
  list(filename = "plot_emis.png",    variable = "EMISPLOT",          label = "Total Emissions (MtCO2e)",                           legend_x = 0.7, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 500),
  list(filename = "GCF_PSNFFR.png",  variable = "GCF_PSNFFRPLOT",   label = "Non-fossil power investment £bn (2022 prices)",       legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 40),
  list(filename = "GDP.png",          variable = "GDPPLOT_R",         label = "GDP £bn (2022 prices)",                              legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.15, ymin = 2000, ymax = 5000),
  list(filename = "INF.png",          variable = "INFPLOT",           label = "CPI Inflation (%)",                                  legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = -2,   ymax = 8),
  list(filename = "WAGE_SHARE.png",   variable = "W_SPLOT",           label = "Wage Share (%)",                                     legend_x = 0.8, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 57.5, ymax = 62.5),
  list(filename = "CR_PS.png",        variable = "CR_PSPLOT",         label = "PS Credit Rationing Rate (%)",                       legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = NULL, ymax = NULL),
  list(filename = "DEBT_GDP.png",     variable = "DEBT_GDP",          label = "Gross Public Debt to GDP Ratio (%)",                 legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 200)
)

# Housing Regulation block (S1, 5, 6)
# Housing subsidies: green housing investment, emissions, electricity mix, macro, public debt
housing_chart_configs <- list(
  list(filename = "GCF_HHHIER.png",  variable = "GCF_HHHIERPLOT",   label = "Green Housing Investment £bn (2022 prices)",          legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = NULL, ymax = NULL),
  list(filename = "plot_emis.png",    variable = "EMISPLOT",          label = "Total Emissions (MtCO2e)",                           legend_x = 0.7, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 500),
  list(filename = "BETA_ELEC.png",    variable = "BETA_ELECPLOT",    label = "Non-fossil fuel electricity share (%)",              legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.15, ymin = 50,   ymax = 100),
  list(filename = "GDP.png",          variable = "GDPPLOT_R",         label = "GDP £bn (2022 prices)",                              legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.15, ymin = 2000, ymax = 5000),
  list(filename = "INF.png",          variable = "INFPLOT",           label = "CPI Inflation (%)",                                  legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = -2,   ymax = 8),
  list(filename = "DEBT_GDP.png",     variable = "DEBT_GDP",          label = "Gross Public Debt to GDP Ratio (%)",                 legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 200)
)

# Govt Investment block (S1, 8, 9)
# Green public investment: power investment, electricity mix, macro, deficit, debt, PS health
gvt_invest_chart_configs <- list(
  list(filename = "GCF_PSNFFR.png",  variable = "GCF_PSNFFRPLOT",   label = "Non-fossil power investment £bn (2022 prices)",       legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 40),
  list(filename = "BETA_ELEC.png",    variable = "BETA_ELECPLOT",    label = "Non-fossil fuel electricity share (%)",              legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.15, ymin = 50,   ymax = 100),
  list(filename = "GDP.png",          variable = "GDPPLOT_R",         label = "GDP £bn (2022 prices)",                              legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.15, ymin = 2000, ymax = 5000),
  list(filename = "INF.png",          variable = "INFPLOT",           label = "CPI Inflation (%)",                                  legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = -2,   ymax = 8),
  list(filename = "DEF_GDP.png",      variable = "DEF_GDP",           label = "Fiscal Deficit (% of GDP)",                          legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 2.5,  ymax = 7.5),
  list(filename = "DEBT_GDP.png",     variable = "DEBT_GDP",          label = "Gross Public Debt to GDP Ratio (%)",                 legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 200),
  list(filename = "CR_PS.png",        variable = "CR_PSPLOT",         label = "PS Credit Rationing Rate (%)",                       legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = NULL, ymax = NULL),
  list(filename = "DEF_PS.png",       variable = "DEF_PSPLOT",        label = "PS Default Rate (%)",                                legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 5)
)

# Mixed block (S1, 4, 6, 7)
# Mixed policies: total green investment, emissions, electricity mix, macro, deficit
mixed_chart_configs <- list(
  list(filename = "GCF_GR.png",       variable = "GCF_GRPLOT",        label = "Total Green Investment £bn (2022 prices)",            legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 100),
  list(filename = "plot_emis.png",    variable = "EMISPLOT",          label = "Total Emissions (MtCO2e)",                           legend_x = 0.7, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 0,    ymax = 500),
  list(filename = "BETA_ELEC.png",    variable = "BETA_ELECPLOT",    label = "Non-fossil fuel electricity share (%)",              legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.15, ymin = 50,   ymax = 100),
  list(filename = "GDP.png",          variable = "GDPPLOT_R",         label = "GDP £bn (2022 prices)",                              legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.15, ymin = 2000, ymax = 5000),
  list(filename = "INF.png",          variable = "INFPLOT",           label = "CPI Inflation (%)",                                  legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = -2,   ymax = 8),
  list(filename = "DEF_GDP.png",      variable = "DEF_GDP",           label = "Fiscal Deficit (% of GDP)",                          legend_x = 0.2, legend_y = 0.9,  ymin = 2.5,  ymax = 7.5)
)

# ---- Result Blocks ----
# scenario_nums : scenario numbers to run and plot together in this block
# cred_cases    : list of credibility overrides (NULL = single run, no override).
#                 Override applies CRED and GVT_CRED after sce$parameters() —
#                 only S2 and S4 are sensitive to these; S1/S3 are shown unchanged.
# chart_configs : charts to generate — point to one of the per-block lists above
# Output dirs   : output/plots/<block>/<case>/  and  output/tables/<block>/<case>/
#                 (case subfolder omitted when cred_cases = NULL)
result_blocks <- list(

  list(
    name          = "power_sector_regulation",
    scenario_nums = c(1, 2, 3, 4),
    cred_cases    = credibility_cases,
    chart_configs = ff_cred_chart_configs
  ),

  list(
    name          = "housing_regulation",
    scenario_nums = c(1, 5, 6),
    cred_cases    = NULL,
    chart_configs = housing_chart_configs
  ),

  list(
    name          = "gvt_investment",
    scenario_nums = c(1, 8, 9),
    cred_cases    = NULL,
    chart_configs = gvt_invest_chart_configs
  ),

  list(
    name          = "mixed",
    scenario_nums = c(1, 4, 6, 7),
    cred_cases    = list(
      list(name = "mutual_trust", label = "Mutual Trust", CRED = 0.9, GVT_CRED = 1)
    ),
    chart_configs = mixed_chart_configs
  )
)


```

```{r create_dirs, include=FALSE}
for (d in c(dir_plots, dir_validation, dir_latex, dir_tables)) {
  dir.create(d, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}
```

# Load Functions and Data

## Functions

```{r}
# Economic Data Validation Function - Fixed Version
# Compares actual vs simulated/future data using statistical methods

validate_economic_data <- function(actual_data, simulated_data, 
                                   variable_names = NULL, 
                                   hp_freq = 6.25, 
                                   max_lag = 20, 
                                   output_dir = "validation_output",
                                   create_plots = TRUE) {
  
  # Load required libraries
  if (!require(mFilter, quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'mFilter' is required but not installed")
  }
  if (create_plots && !require(Cairo, quietly = TRUE)) {
    message("Package 'Cairo' not available, using standard graphics")
  }
  
  # Convert to data frames/matrices if they're vectors
  if (is.vector(actual_data)) {
    actual_data <- as.data.frame(actual_data)
  }
  if (is.vector(simulated_data)) {
    simulated_data <- as.data.frame(simulated_data)
  }
  
  # Check data validity
  if (ncol(actual_data) != ncol(simulated_data)) {
    stop("actual_data and simulated_data must have the same number of columns")
  }
  
  if (any(actual_data <= 0, na.rm = TRUE) || any(simulated_data <= 0, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    stop("All data values must be positive for log transformation")
  }
  
  # Set default variable names if not provided
  if (is.null(variable_names)) {
    variable_names <- paste0("Var_", 1:ncol(actual_data))
  }
  
  # Create output directory if it doesn't exist
  if (create_plots && !dir.exists(output_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Initialize results storage
  n_vars <- ncol(actual_data)
  results <- list()
  
  # Process each variable
  for (i in 1:n_vars) {
    var_name <- variable_names[i]
    
    # Get actual and simulated data (log transform)
    actual_log <- log(actual_data[, i])
    simulated_log <- log(simulated_data[, i])
    
    # Check for NAs or infinite values
    if (any(is.na(actual_log)) || any(is.na(simulated_log))) {
      warning(paste("NAs found in", var_name, "- removing NAs"))
      actual_log <- na.omit(actual_log)
      simulated_log <- na.omit(simulated_log)
    }
    
    # Apply HP filter
    tryCatch({
      actual_hp <- hpfilter(actual_log, freq = hp_freq, drift = TRUE)
      simulated_hp <- hpfilter(simulated_log, freq = hp_freq, drift = TRUE)
    }, error = function(e) {
      stop(paste("HP filter failed for", var_name, ":", e$message))
    })
    
    # Calculate statistics
    actual_cycle <- actual_hp$cycle
    simulated_cycle <- simulated_hp$cycle
    
    # Auto-correlations
    actual_acf <- acf(actual_cycle, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE)
    simulated_acf <- acf(simulated_cycle, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE)
    
    # Cross-correlations with first variable (typically GDP/output)
    if (i == 1) {
      # Self-correlation for reference variable
      actual_ccf <- ccf(actual_cycle, actual_cycle, lag.max = 10, plot = FALSE)
      simulated_ccf <- ccf(simulated_cycle, simulated_cycle, lag.max = 10, plot = FALSE)
    } else {
      # Cross-correlation with first variable
      ref_actual <- hpfilter(log(actual_data[, 1]), freq = hp_freq, drift = TRUE)$cycle
      ref_simulated <- hpfilter(log(simulated_data[, 1]), freq = hp_freq, drift = TRUE)$cycle
      
      actual_ccf <- ccf(actual_cycle, ref_actual, lag.max = 10, plot = FALSE)
      simulated_ccf <- ccf(simulated_cycle, ref_simulated, lag.max = 10, plot = FALSE)
    }
    
    # Volatility (standard deviation of cyclical component)
    actual_volatility <- sd(100 * actual_cycle)
    simulated_volatility <- sd(100 * simulated_cycle)
    
    # Store results
    results[[var_name]] <- list(
      actual_acf = actual_acf$acf,
      simulated_acf = simulated_acf$acf,
      actual_ccf = actual_ccf$acf,
      simulated_ccf = simulated_ccf$acf,
      actual_volatility = actual_volatility,
      simulated_volatility = simulated_volatility,
      actual_cycle = actual_cycle,
      simulated_cycle = simulated_cycle
    )
    
    # Create plots if requested
    if (create_plots) {
      # Auto-correlation plot
      png(file.path(output_dir, paste0("autocorr_", var_name, ".png")), 
          width = 800, height = 600, res = 150)
      par(mar = c(4, 4, 2, 1))
      
      plot(0:max_lag, actual_acf$acf, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "blue",
           xlab = "Lag", ylab = "Auto-correlation", 
           main = paste("Auto-correlation:", var_name),
           ylim = c(-0.5, 1))
      lines(0:max_lag, simulated_acf$acf, lwd = 2, col = "red", lty = 2)
      legend("topright", legend = c("Actual", "Simulated"), 
             col = c("blue", "red"), lty = c(1, 2), lwd = 2)
      grid(TRUE)
      dev.off()
      
      # Cross-correlation plot
      png(file.path(output_dir, paste0("crosscorr_", var_name, ".png")), 
          width = 800, height = 600, res = 150)
      par(mar = c(4, 4, 2, 1))
      
      lags <- -10:10
      plot(lags, actual_ccf$acf, type = "l", lwd = 2, col = "blue",
           xlab = "Lag", ylab = "Cross-correlation with Reference", 
           main = paste("Cross-correlation:", var_name),
           ylim = c(-1, 1))
      lines(lags, simulated_ccf$acf, lwd = 2, col = "red", lty = 2)
      legend("topright", legend = c("Actual", "Simulated"), 
             col = c("blue", "red"), lty = c(1, 2), lwd = 2)
      grid(TRUE)
      abline(v = 0, col = "gray", lty = 3)
      dev.off()
    }
  }
  
  # Create summary table
  volatility_comparison <- data.frame(
    Variable = variable_names,
    Actual_Volatility = sapply(results, function(x) x$actual_volatility),
    Simulated_Volatility = sapply(results, function(x) x$simulated_volatility),
    Volatility_Ratio = sapply(results, function(x) x$simulated_volatility / x$actual_volatility)
  )
  
  # Calculate summary statistics
  summary_stats <- list(
    volatility_comparison = volatility_comparison,
    mean_volatility_ratio = mean(volatility_comparison$Volatility_Ratio),
    correlation_fit = calculate_correlation_fit(results),
    results = results
  )
  
  return(summary_stats)
}

# Helper function to calculate how well correlations match
calculate_correlation_fit <- function(results) {
  acf_rmse <- numeric(length(results))
  ccf_rmse <- numeric(length(results))
  
  for (i in 1:length(results)) {
    # RMSE for auto-correlations
    acf_rmse[i] <- sqrt(mean((results[[i]]$actual_acf - results[[i]]$simulated_acf)^2))
    
    # RMSE for cross-correlations
    ccf_rmse[i] <- sqrt(mean((results[[i]]$actual_ccf - results[[i]]$simulated_ccf)^2))
  }
  
  return(data.frame(
    Variable = names(results),
    ACF_RMSE = acf_rmse,
    CCF_RMSE = ccf_rmse
  ))
}

# Fixed function call example:
# result <- validate_economic_data(
#   actual_data = data.frame(GDP = GDP_R[51:136]), 
#   simulated_data = data.frame(GDP = GDP_R[145:196]),
#   variable_names = c("GDP"),
#   create_plots = TRUE
# )

yearly_baseline_s <- function(quarterly_data) {
  # Convert quarterly to yearly by summing every 4 quarters
  # 2025: quarters 153:156, 2030: quarters 173:176, 2040: quarters 213:216
  yearly_data <- numeric(16)  # 16 years from 2025 to 2040

  for (i in 1:16) {
    start_idx <- 152 + (i - 1) * 4 + 1  # Start from quarter 153 (2025 Q1)
    end_idx <- start_idx + 3
    yearly_data[i] <- sum(quarterly_data[start_idx:end_idx])
  }

  # Extract the 5 required outputs
  value_2025 <- yearly_data[1]
  value_2030 <- yearly_data[6]
  value_2040 <- yearly_data[16]
  mean_2025_2040 <- mean(yearly_data)
  sd_2025_2040 <- sd(yearly_data)

  return(c(value_2025, value_2030, value_2040, mean_2025_2040, sd_2025_2040))
}

yearly_baseline_m <- function(quarterly_data) {
  # Convert quarterly to yearly by taking the mean of every 4 quarters
  # 2025: quarters 153:156, 2030: quarters 173:176, 2040: quarters 213:216
  yearly_data <- numeric(16)  # 16 years from 2025 to 2040

  for (i in 1:16) {
    start_idx <- 152 + (i - 1) * 4 + 1  # Start from quarter 153 (2025 Q1)
    end_idx <- start_idx + 3
    yearly_data[i] <- mean(quarterly_data[start_idx:end_idx])
  }

  # Extract the 5 required outputs
  value_2025 <- yearly_data[1]
  value_2030 <- yearly_data[6]
  value_2040 <- yearly_data[16]
  mean_2025_2040 <- mean(yearly_data)
  sd_2025_2040 <- sd(yearly_data)

  return(c(value_2025, value_2030, value_2040, mean_2025_2040, sd_2025_2040))
}

ratio <- function(x) {
  L <- length(x)
  mean(x[57:L] / GDP[57:L], na.rm = TRUE)*100
}

avg_gdp <- function(x, start = 57) {
  L <- length(x)
  mean(x[start:L] / GDP[start:L], na.rm = TRUE) * 100
}


```


```{r}
ex <-function(x,t){
  ex_g <- 0.5333*(x[t-1]/x[t-2]) + 0.2667*(x[t-2]/x[t-3]) + 0.1333*(x[t-3]/x[t-4]) + 0.0667*(x[t-4]/x[t-5])
  return(ex_g*x[t-1])
}
```

## Load Required Packages

```{r}

start_time <- Sys.time()


setwd(dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)) #sets working directory to source filepath

packages <-  c("zoo", "tidyverse", "readxl", "httr", "dynamac", "tseries", "lmtest", "urca", "dyn", "tsDyn", "dplyr", "dLagM", "openxlsx", "car", "lmtest", "seasonal","ggplot2","ggthemes","showtext","sysfonts","showtextdb","xtable","data.table")

# Modified function to ask permission before installing
install_and_load <- function(pkg) {
  if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE)) {
    response <- readline(prompt = paste("Package", pkg, "is not installed. Install it? (Y/N): "))
    if (tolower(response) == "y") {
      install.packages(pkg, dependencies = TRUE)
      library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
      cat(paste("Package", pkg, "has been installed and loaded.\n"))
    } else {
      warning(paste("Package", pkg, "was not installed. Some functionality may be limited."))
    }
  } else {
    cat(paste("Package", pkg, "is already installed.\n"))
  }
}

# Apply the function to each package in the list
invisible(sapply(packages, install_and_load))


```

```{r}
  nrow = 2
)



var_names_new <- list(
  var_names_bbf,var_names_bbs, var_names_ea, var_names_lms, var_names_mydata
)

if(!exists("var_names")){var_names<-list()}

if(!identical(var_names, var_names_new)){
  var_names <- var_names_new
  
  # Vectorized range generation
  generate_ranges <- function(start, end, freq = "year") {
    if(freq == "year") {
      seq(start, end)
    } else {
      quarters <- seq(as.Date(paste0(start, "-01-01")), 
                      as.Date(paste0(end, "-12-31")), by = "quarter")
      paste0(format(quarters, "%Y"), " Q", as.numeric(substr(quarters(quarters), 2, 2)))
    }
  }
  
  range <- Data_Start:Data_End
  range_ea <- generate_ranges(Data_Start, Data_End, "quarter")
  range_baseline <- generate_ranges(2023, 2040, "quarter")
  
  # Optimized Excel reading function
  read_excel_fast <- function(path, var_matrix, range) {
    dt <- as.data.table(read_excel(path, skip = 1))
    codes <- var_matrix[2, ]
    dt <- dt[CDID %in% range, ..codes]
    setnames(dt, var_matrix[1, ])
    dt <- dt[, lapply(.SD, as.numeric)]
    return(dt)
  }
  
  # Load Blue Book data with interpolation
  bbf <- read_excel_fast(file.path(dir_input, "bb.xlsx"), var_names_bbf, range)
  L <- nrow(bbf)
  
  # Vectorized spline interpolation
  interpolate_bbf <- function(col) {
    k <- which.max(!is.na(col))
    if(is.na(col[k])) return(rep(NA_real_, L*4))
    
    x <- seq(k - 0.375, L + 0.375, length.out = L*4)
    spline(x = k:L, y = col[k:L], xout = x, method = "natural")$y/4
  }
  
  bbfq <- as.data.table(lapply(bbf, interpolate_bbf))
  
  # Load Blue Book data with interpolation
  bbs <- read_excel_fast(file.path(dir_input, "bb.xlsx"), var_names_bbs, range)
  L <- nrow(bbs)
  
  # Vectorized spline interpolation
  interpolate_bbs <- function(col) {
    k <- which.max(!is.na(col))
    if(is.na(col[k])) return(rep(NA_real_, L*4))
    
    x <- seq(k - 0.375, L + 0.375, length.out = L*4)
    spline(x = k:L, y = col[k:L], xout = x, method = "natural")$y
  }
  
  bbsq <- as.data.table(lapply(bbs, interpolate_bbs))
  
  
  # Load other datasets using optimized function
  ea     <- read_excel_fast(file.path(dir_input, "ukea.xlsx"),    var_names_ea,    range_ea)
  lms    <- read_excel_fast(file.path(dir_input, "lms.xlsx"),     var_names_lms,   range_ea)
  mydata <- read_excel_fast(file.path(dir_input, "UKmydata.xlsx"),var_names_mydata,range_ea)

  # Optimized BOE rate calculation using data.table
  boe_data <- as.data.table(read_excel(file.path(dir_input, "BOE Interest Rates.xlsx"), skip = 1))
  boe_data[, Date := as.Date(`Date Changed`, format = "%d %b %y")]
  setkey(boe_data, Date)
  
  quarters_dt <- data.table(
    Date = as.Date(as.yearqtr(range_ea, format = "%YQ%q"))
  )
  setkey(quarters_dt, Date)
  
  boe_rate <- boe_data[quarters_dt, roll = Inf][, .(Date, Rate)]
  
}
L <- length(transpose(ea))


  # Define baseline variables directly:
  file_path <- file.path(dir_input, "UKmybaseline.xlsx")
  col_names <- read_excel(file_path, n_max = 1, col_names = FALSE)[-1] |>   as.character()
  data <- read_excel(file_path, skip = 2, col_names = FALSE)[-1]
  names(data) <- col_names
  for (col_name in names(data)) {
  new_var_name <- paste0(col_name, "_BASE")
  col_vector <- as.numeric(data[[col_name]])
  assign(new_var_name, col_vector, envir = .GlobalEnv)
}



```

# The Model

## Equations

```{r}
Equations<-function(t){
  
  
  #X#Ecosystem
  
  #XX#Energy
  E[t] <<- E_P[t]+E_H[t]
  E_P[t] <<- epsilon[t]*GO_PR[t]
  E_H[t] <<- E_ELECH[t]+E_NELECH[t]
  #XXX#
  E_ELECD[t] <<- E_ELECPD[t] + E_ELECH[t]
  E_ELEC[t] <<- E_ELECP[t] + E_ELECH[t]
  E_ELECMAX[t] <<- (CF_FF*K_PSFFR[t]+CF_NFF[t]*(K_PSNFFR[t]+K_GVTNFFR[t])) * (1 + ELEC_BUFFER)
  E_ELECNFF[t] <<- min(E_ELEC[t]*sigma_ELEC,CF_NFF[t]*(K_PSNFFR[t]+K_GVTNFFR[t]))
  E_ELECFF[t] <<- E_ELEC[t] - E_ELECNFF[t]
  E_ELECPD[t] <<- theta_P[t]*E_P[t]
  E_ELECP[t] <<- E_ELECPD[t] - max(0,E_ELECD[t]-E_ELECMAX[t])
  E_ELECH[t] <<- (theta_HI*H_I[t]+theta_HEN*H_EN[t])*beta_ELECH + theta_HEE*H_EE[t]
  #XXX#
  E_NELEC[t] <<- (E_NELECP[t] + E_NELECH[t]) + max(0,E_ELECD[t]-E_ELECMAX[t])
  E_NELECP[t] <<- (1-theta_P[t])*E_P[t]
  E_NELECH[t] <<- (theta_HI*H_I[t]+theta_HEN*H_EN[t])*(1-beta_ELECH)
  
  #XX#Emissions
  EMIS[t] <<- EMIS_NELEC[t] + EMIS_ELEC[t]
  EMIS_NELEC[t] <<- omega_NELEC[t]*E_NELEC[t]
  EMIS_ELEC[t] <<- omega_ELEC[t]*E_ELECFF[t]
  
  
  #XX#Ecological efficiency and technology
  epsilon[t] <<- epsilon_min + (epsilon_max-epsilon_min)*(1+pi_1)/(1 + pi_1*exp(kappa_1*(K_PG[t-1]/K_PC[t-1]))) 
  CF_NFF[t] <<- if(isTRUE(E_ELECFF[t-1] > 0)){CF_min + (CF_max-CF_min)*(1+pi_2)/(1 + pi_2*exp(kappa_2*(E_ELECNFF[t-1]/E_ELECFF[t-1])))}else{CF_max}
  theta_P[t] <<- 1 - (1+pi_3)/(1 + pi_3*exp(kappa_3*(K_PG[t-1]/K_PC[t-1])))
  omega_NELEC[t] <<- omega_nemin + (omega_nemax-omega_nemin)*(1+pi_4)/(1 + pi_4*exp(kappa_4*(K_PG[t-1]/K_PC[t-1])))
  omega_ELEC[t] <<- if(isTRUE(E_ELECFF[t-1] > 0)){omega_emin + (omega_emax-omega_emin)*(1+pi_5)/(1 + pi_5*exp(kappa_5*(E_ELECNFF[t-1]/E_ELECFF[t-1])))}else{omega_emin}
  
  #X#Macroeconomy and financial system
  
  #XX#GDP Determination
  GDP[t] <<- CONS[t]+GCF[t]+EXP[t]-IMP[t]
  GDP_ADJ[t] <<- epsilon_GDP*GDP[t]
  CONS[t] <<- CONS_GVT[t] + CONS_HH[t]
  GCF[t] <<- GCF_NFC[t] + GCF_PS[t] + GCF_GVT[t] + GCF_HH[t] + if(GVT_INVEST==1){SPEND_GVTPS[t]}else{0}
  GO[t] <<- GO_P[t] + GO_PS[t]
  #XXX#
  GDP_R[t] <<- CONS_R[t]+GCF_R[t]+EXP_R[t]-IMP_R[t]

  CONS_R[t] <<- CONS[t]/P_P[t]
  GCF_R[t] <<- GCF[t]/P_P[t]
  GO_R[t] <<- GO[t]/P_P[t]
  #XXX#
  g[t] <<- (GDP[t]/GDP[t-1])
  #XXX#
  P[t] <<- GDP[t]/GDP_R[t]
  #XXX#
  lambda[t] <<- exp(log(lambda[t-1]) + alpha_1lambda* diff(log(GDP_R[(t-1):t]))+alpha_2lambda*diff(log(GCF_R[(t-1):t]-GCF_HHR[(t-1):t])))
  nu[t] <<- nu[t-1]

  #XXX#
  EMP[t] <<- GDP_R[t]/lambda[t]
  EMP_PUB[t] <<- (LF[t]/LF[t-1])*EMP_PUB[t-1]
  EMP_PRI[t] <<- EMP[t] - EMP_PUB[t]
  #XXX#
  GDP_RFE[t] <<- lambda[t]*LF[t]
  GDP_RFK[t] <<- nu[t]*K_PR[t]
  GDP_RFELEC[t] <<- if(isTRUE(theta_P[t]*epsilon[t] > 0 & GO_PR[t-1] > 0)){(E_ELECMAX[t] - E_ELECH[t])/(theta_P[t]*epsilon[t]) * (GDP_R[t-1]/GO_PR[t-1])}else{Inf}
  GDP_RMAX[t] <<- min(GDP_RFE[t],GDP_RFK[t],GDP_RFELEC[t], na.rm = TRUE)
  g_LFB[t] <<- (0.001747) * (1 - 0.35 * min((t - L - 1) / max(T - 1, 1), 1))
  LF[t] <<- ifelse(t<(152),(1+g_LFB[t]*4)*LF[t-1],(1+g_LFB[t])*LF[t-1])
  POP[t] <<- POP_OBR[t]
  #TO DO!
  re[t] <<- EMP[t]/LF[t]
  ru[t] <<- 1-re[t]
  u[t] <<- GDP_R[t]/GDP_RFK[t]
  u_NFC_W[t] <<- u[t]


  #XX#Domestic production module
  F_P[t] <<- CONS_HHP[t] + CONS_GVT[t] + GCF[t] + EXP[t]
  F_PR[t] <<- CONS_HHPR[t] + CONS_GVTR[t] + GCF_R[t] +EXP_R[t]
  GO_PR[t] <<- L_PP[t]*F_PR[t] + L_PPS[t]*F_PSR[t]
  GO_P[t] <<- GO_PR[t]*P_P[t]
  COST_P[t] <<- W[t] + ITAX_P[t] + IC_PP[t] + IC_PSP[t] + IMP[t]
  GOS_P[t] <<- GO_P[t]-COST_P[t]
  #XXX#
  P_P[t] <<- max((1+MU[t-1])*UC[t-1], rho_SC*(if(isTRUE(GDP_RMAX[t] - EXP_R[t] + IMP_R[t] > 0)){(CONS[t] + GCF[t]) / (GDP_RMAX[t] - EXP_R[t] + IMP_R[t])}else{0}) + (1-rho_SC)*(1+MU[t-1])*UC[t-1])
  UC[t] <<- COST_P[t]/GO_PR[t]
  MU[t] <<- alpha_1MU*(u[t])
  INF_A[t] <<- ((P_P[t]/P_P[t-1])^4)-1
  #XXX#
  W_S[t] <<- 1/(1+exp(-(alpha_0WS - alpha_1WS*ru[t])))
  WR[t] <<- W_S[t]*(GDP[t]/EMP[t])
  WR_PRI[t] <<- beta_WRPRI*WR[t]
  WR_PUB[t] <<- beta_WRPUB*WR[t-1]
  W_PRI[t] <<- WR_PRI[t]*EMP_PRI[t]
  W_PUB[t] <<-WR_PUB[t]*EMP_PUB[t]
  W[t] <<-  W_PRI[t] + W_PUB[t] 
  #XXX#
  P_NELEC[t] <<- alpha_NELEC*(beta_NELECGAS*P_GAS[t]+beta_NELECOIL*P_OIL[t])
  P_FUEL[t] <<- alpha_PFUEL*P_GAS[t] 
  P_GAS[t] <<- P_GAS_BASE[t-L]*P_P[t]
  P_OIL[t] <<- P_OIL_BASE[t-L]*P_P[t]
  P_NELECT[t] <<- P_NELEC[t] + (ITAX_NELEC[t]/E_NELEC[t])
  COST_NELEC[t] <<- P_NELEC[t]*E_NELEC[t]
  COST_ER[t] <<- (COST_NELEC[t]  + ITAX_NELEC[t] + CONS_HHPS[t] + IC_PSP[t])/P_P[t]
  #XXX#
  K_P[t] <<- K_NFC[t]+K_GVT[t]
  K_PG[t] <<- K_NFCG[t]+K_GVTG[t]
  K_PC[t] <<- K_NFCC[t]+K_GVTC[t]
  K_PR[t] <<- K_NFCR[t]+K_GVTR[t]
  K_PGR[t] <<- K_NFCGR[t]+K_GVTGR[t]
  K_PCR[t] <<- K_NFCCR[t]+K_GVTCR[t]
  delta_KP[t] <<- delta_kpc


  #XX#The power generation sector
  F_PS[t] <<- CONS_HHPS[t]
  F_PSR[t] <<- CONS_HHPSR[t]
  GO_PSR[t] <<- (L_PSP[t]*F_PR[t] + L_PSPS[t]*F_PSR[t])
  GO_PS[t] <<- GO_PSR[t]*P_ELEC[t]
  COST_PS[t] <<- (ITAX_PS[t]  + IC_PPS[t] + IC_PSPS[t])
  GOS_PS[t] <<- GO_PS[t] - COST_PS[t]
  #XXX#
  beta_NFF[t] <<- E_ELECNFF[t]/E_ELEC[t]
  COST_PSNFF[t] <<- (ITAX_PSNFF[t]+(IC_PSPS[t]+IC_OPPS[t])*((K_GVTNFF[t-1]+K_PSNFF[t-1])/(K_PS[t-1]+K_GVTNFF[t-1]))+delta_KPSNFF[t]*(K_GVTNFF[t-1]+K_PSNFF[t-1]))
  COST_PSFF[t] <<- (ITAX_PSFF[t]+IC_FUELPS[t] + (IC_PSPS[t]+IC_OPPS[t])*((K_GVTNFF[t-1]+K_PSNFF[t-1])/(K_PS[t-1]+K_GVTNFF[t-1]))+delta_KPSFF[t]*(K_GVTNFF[t-1]+K_PSNFF[t-1]))
  AC_NFF[t] <<- COST_PSNFF[t]/(GO_PSR[t]*(beta_NFF[t]))
  AC_FF[t] <<- if(isTRUE((1-beta_NFF[t]) > 0)){COST_PSFF[t]/(GO_PSR[t]*(1-beta_NFF[t]))}else{0}
  r_KNFF[t] <<- if(isTRUE((K_PSNFF[t] + K_GVTNFF[t]) > 0)){(P_ELEC[t]*E_ELECNFF[t] - COST_PSNFF[t])/(K_PSNFF[t] + K_GVTNFF[t])}else{0}
  r_KFF[t] <<- if(isTRUE(K_PSFF[t] > 0)){(P_ELEC[t]*E_ELECFF[t] - COST_PSFF[t])/K_PSFF[t]}else{0}
  prop_NFF[t] <<- 1/(1+exp(-(alpha_0bNFF + alpha_1bNFF*(r_KNFF[t-1] - r_KFF[t-1]))))
  AC_PS[t] <<- (COST_PS[t]+INTP_PS[t]+DIVP_PS[t]-INTR_PS[t]-DIVR_PS[t]+delta_KPSFF[t]*K_PSFF[t-1]+delta_KPSNFF[t]*(K_GVTNFF[t-1]+K_PSNFF[t-1]))/GO_PSR[t]
  #XXX#
  MC_FF[t] <<- if(isTRUE(E_ELECFF[t-1] > 0)){(IC_FUELPS[t]+COV_ETSPS[t]*P_ETS[t]*EMIS_ELEC[t])/E_ELECFF[t-1]}else{MC_FF[t-1]}
  MC_ELEC[t] <<- MC_FF[t]*(1-beta_NFF[t])^mu_MCELEC
  P_ELECLR[t] <<- if (t < 153) {min(MU_ELEC * MC_ELEC[t], P_ELEC[L] * P_P[t])} else { if (isTRUE(E_ELECD[t-1] > E_ELECMAX[t-1])) {   MU_ELEC*AC_NFF[t-1] } else {  MU_ELEC* MC_ELEC[t]  }}
  P_ELEC_BASE[t] <<- if ((ALT_PRICING ==1) &&!is.nan(AC_PS[t]) && (t>152) && P_ELECLR[t] < (AC_PS[t])){AC_PS[t]} else {P_ELECLR[t]}
  SUBS_PS[t] <<- if(GVT_INVEST!=1){SPEND_GVTPS[t]} else{0}  

  #XXX#
  INTR_PS[t] <<- r_IBAPS[t]*IBA_PS[t-1]
  INTP_PS[t] <<- r_IBLPS[t]*IBL_PS[t-1]
  YD_PS[t] <<- GOS_PS[t] - max((GVT_ELECS[t-1])*GOS_PS[t], 0) + INTR_PS[t] - INTP_PS[t] + SUBS_PS[t]
  DIVR_PS[t] <<- beta_dps*(EQA_PS[t]/(EQL_NMFI[t]-EQN_RoW[t]))*DIVP_NMFI[t]
  DIVP_PS[t] <<- alpha_DIVPPS*GO_PS[t]
  RP_PS[t] <<- YD_PS[t] + DIVR_PS[t] - DIVP_PS[t] 
  #XXX#
  u_FF[t] <<- if(isTRUE(K_PSFFR[t] > 0)){E_ELECFF[t]/(CF_FF*K_PSFFR[t])}else{0}
  u_NFF[t] <<- E_ELECNFF[t]/(CF_NFF[t]*(K_PSNFFR[t]+K_GVTNFFR[t]))
  u_PS[t] <<- E_ELEC[t]/(E_ELECMAX[t])
  u_PS_W[t]  <<- CRED * (u_PS[t] + sum(delta_PS^(1:H_PS) * u_PS_E[t,])) / (1 + sum(delta_PS^(1:H_PS))) + (1-CRED) * u_PS[t]
  GCF_PSD[t] <<- max((alpha_0GCFPS + alpha_1GCFNFC*(u_PS_W[t-1]-u_T) + alpha_2GCFNFC*(GCF_PSD[t-1]/K_PS[t-2]))*K_PS[t-1], 0)
  GCF_PSFFD[t] <<- if(FF_BAN==1 && GVT_CRED==1 && t >= FF_CAP_BAN){0}else{(1-prop_NFF[t])*GCF_PSD[t]}
  GCF_PSNFFD[t] <<- if(FF_BAN==1 && GVT_CRED==1 && t >= FF_CAP_BAN){GCF_PSD[t]}else{prop_NFF[t]*GCF_PSD[t]}
  GCF_PSFF[t] <<- (1-CR_PS[t])*GCF_PSFFD[t]
  GCF_PSNFF[t] <<- (1-CR_PS[t])*(GCF_PSNFFD[t]- CO_NFF*(SPEND_GVTPS[t])) 
  GCF_PSNFFG[t] <<- GCF_PSNFF[t] + if(GVT_INVEST!=1){SPEND_GVTPS[t]} else{0}
  GCF_PS[t] <<- GCF_PSNFFG[t] + GCF_PSFF[t]
  GCF_PSR[t] <<- GCF_PSFFR[t] + GCF_PSNFFR[t]
  GCF_PSFFR[t] <<- GCF_PSFF[t]/P_P[t]
  GCF_PSNFFR[t] <<- GCF_PSNFFG[t]/P_P[t]
  LEND_PS[t] <<- RP_PS[t] - GCF_PS[t]
  #XXX#
  IBATR_PS[t] <<- alpha_IBAPS*GO_PS[t]
  EQATR_PS[t] <<- alpha_EQAPS*GO_PS[t]
  EQLTR_PS[t] <<- (GO_PS[t]/GO[t])*(EQATR_NMFI[t])
  IBLTR_PS[t] <<- (IBATR_PS[t] + EQATR_PS[t] + RESTR_PS[t]) - (LEND_PS[t]+EQLTR_PS[t])
  RESTR_PS[t] <<- eta_PSB*GO_PS[t]
  #XXX#
  OT_IBAPS[t] <<- delta_IBAPS*(IBA_PS[t-1])
  
  
  OT_EQAPS[t] <<- beta_dps*(EQA_PS[t-1]/(EQL_NMFI[t-1]-EQN_RoW[t-1]))*OT_EQLNMFI[t]
  OT_EQLPS[t] <<- ((DIVP_PS[t]/(r_IBLGVT[t]-beta_EQLPS))-EQL_PS[t-1])
  OT_IBLPS[t] <<- -DEF_PS[t]*(IBL_PS[t-1])
  DEF_PS[t] <<- (def_max/(1+def_0PS*exp(def_1-def_2*ILLIQ_PS[t-1])))
  
  OT_RESPS[t] <<- delta_RESPS*(RES_PS[t-1])
  #XXX#
  IBA_PS[t] <<- IBA_PS[t-1] + IBATR_PS[t] + OT_IBAPS[t]
  EQA_PS[t] <<- EQA_PS[t-1] + EQATR_PS[t] + OT_EQAPS[t]
  EQL_PS[t] <<- EQL_PS[t-1] + EQLTR_PS[t] + OT_EQLPS[t]
  IBL_PS[t] <<- IBL_PS[t-1] + IBLTR_PS[t] + OT_IBLPS[t]
  FA_PS[t] <<- IBA_PS[t] + EQA_PS[t]   
  FL_PS[t] <<- IBL_PS[t] + EQL_PS[t]
  FNW_PSM[t] <<- FA_PS[t] - FL_PS[t]
  RES_PS[t] <<- RES_PS[t-1] + RESTR_PS[t] + OT_RESPS[t]
  FNW_PS[t] <<- FNW_PSM[t] + RES_PS[t]
  #XXX#
  K_PSR[t] <<- K_PSFFR[t] + K_PSNFFR[t]
  K_PSFFR[t] <<- if(FF_BAN==1 && GVT_CRED==1 && t >= FF_CAP_BAN){0}else{(1-delta_KPSFF[t])*K_PSFFR[t-1]+GCF_PSFFR[t]}
  delta_KPSFF[t] <<- if(isTRUE(u_FF[t-1] > 0)){delta_KPSFF[L]*(u_FF[L]/u_FF[t-1])}else{delta_KPSFF[t-1]}
  K_PSNFFR[t] <<- (1-delta_KPSNFF[t])*K_PSNFFR[t-1]+GCF_PSNFFR[t]
  delta_KPSNFF[t] <<- delta_KPSNFF[t-1]
  K_PSNFF_E[t,] <<- K_PSNFFR[t]
  K_PSFF_E[t,]  <<- ifelse(FF_BAN==1 & (t + 1:H_PS) >= FF_CAP_BAN, 0, K_PSFFR[t])
  E_ELEC_E[t,]  <<- E_ELEC[t]
  u_PS_E[t,]  <<- ifelse((CF_FF * K_PSFF_E[t,] + CF_NFF[t] * (K_PSNFF_E[t,] + K_GVTNFFR[t])) > 0, E_ELEC_E[t,] / (CF_FF * K_PSFF_E[t,] + CF_NFF[t] * (K_PSNFF_E[t,] + K_GVTNFFR[t])), 0)
  K_PS[t] <<- K_PSNFF[t] + K_PSFF[t]
  K_PSFF[t] <<- K_PSFFR[t]*P_P[t]
  K_PSNFF[t] <<- K_PSNFFR[t]*P_P[t]
  NW_PS[t] <<- FNW_PS[t] + K_PS[t]
  #XXX#
  LEV_PS[t] <<- IBL_PS[t]/K_PS[t]
  ILLIQ_PS[t] <<- (INTP_PS[t]+ITAX_PS[t]+DIVP_PS[t]+GCF_PS[t]-SUBS_PS[t]+delta_KPSFF[t]*K_PSFF[t-1]+delta_KPSNFF[t]*K_PSNFF[t-1]+IBATR_PS[t]+EQATR_PS[t]+IC_PPS[t]+IC_PSPS[t])/(GO_PS[t]+INTR_PS[t]+DIVR_PS[t]+EQLTR_PS[t]+IBLTR_PS[t]+SUBS_PS[t])
  DSR_PS[t] <<- ((YD_PS[t]-delta_KPSNFF[t]*K_PSNFF[t-1]-delta_KPSFF[t]*K_PSFF[t-1]+INTP_PS[t])/INTP_PS[t])
  CR_PS[t] <<- 1/(1+exp(-(alpha_0CRPS + alpha_1CRNFC*CR_PS[t-1] -alpha_2CRNFC*DSR_PS[t-1] + alpha_3CRNFC*(FL_MFI[t-1]/FA_MFI[t-1]))))

  
  #XX#Input-Output Calculations
  alpha_PP[t] <<- alpha_PPLR
  alpha_PSP[t] <<- epsilon[t]*theta_P[t]
  alpha_PSPS[t] <<- alpha_PSPSLR
  alpha_OPPS[t] <<- alpha_OPPSLR
  alpha_FUELPS[t] <<- (1-beta_NFF[t-1])*alpha_FUELPSLR 
  alpha_PPS[t] <<- alpha_FUELPS[t]*(P_FUEL[t]/P_P[t]) + alpha_OPPS[t]

  #XXX#
  IC_PSPR[t] <<- alpha_PSP[t]*GO_PR[t]
  IC_FUELPSR[t] <<- alpha_FUELPS[t]*GO_PSR[t]
  IC_OPPSR[t] <<- alpha_OPPS[t]*GO_PSR[t]
  IC_PPR[t] <<- alpha_PP[t]*GO_PR[t] 
  IC_PP[t] <<- IC_PPR[t]*P_P[t] 
  IC_PSP_SC[t] <<- if(isTRUE(P_P[t] > (1+MU[t-1])*UC[t-1] & IC_PSPR[t] > 0)){val <- P_P[t]/(1+MU[t-1])*GO_PR[t] - W[t] - ITAX_P[t] - IC_PP[t] - IMP[t]; if(is.finite(val) & val > IC_PSPR[t]*P_ELEC_BASE[t]){val}else{IC_PSPR[t]*P_ELEC_BASE[t]}}else{IC_PSPR[t]*P_ELEC_BASE[t]}
  IC_PSP[t] <<- IC_PSP_SC[t]
  P_ELEC[t] <<-if(isTRUE(IC_PSPR[t] > 0)){IC_PSP[t]/IC_PSPR[t]}else{P_ELEC_BASE[t]}
  IC_PSPS[t] <<- alpha_PSPS[t]*GO_PS[t]
  IC_PPS[t] <<- IC_FUELPS[t] +  IC_OPPS[t] 
  IC_FUELPS[t] <<- IC_FUELPSR[t]*P_FUEL[t]
  IC_OPPS[t] <<-IC_OPPSR[t]*P_P[t]
  #XXX#
  det_IA[t] <<- ((1-alpha_PP[t])*(1-alpha_PSPS[t]))-((alpha_PPS[t])*(alpha_PSP[t])) 
  L_PP[t] <<- (1-alpha_PSPS[t])/det_IA[t]
  L_PPS[t] <<- alpha_PPS[t]/det_IA[t]
  L_PSP[t] <<- alpha_PSP[t]/det_IA[t]
  L_PSPS[t] <<- (1-alpha_PP[t])/det_IA[t]
  
  
  
  #XX#Non-financial corporations
  YP_NFC[t] <<- GOS_P[t] + INTR_NFC[t] - INTP_NFC[t]
  INTR_NFC[t] <<- r_IBANFC[t]*IBA_NFC[t-1]
  INTP_NFC[t] <<- r_IBLNFC[t]*IBL_NFC[t-1]
  YD_NFC[t] <<- YP_NFC[t] - INTAX_NFC[t]
  #XXX#
  DIVR_NFC[t] <<- DIVP_NMFI[t]-(DIVR_HH[t]+DIVR_PS[t])
  DIVP_NFC[t] <<- alpha_DIVPNFC*YD_NFC[t]
  RP_NFC[t] <<- YD_NFC[t] + DIVR_NFC[t] - DIVP_NFC[t]
  #XXX#
  GCF_NFCD[t] <<- (alpha_0GCFNFC + alpha_1GCFNFC*(u_NFC_W[t-1]-u_T) +  alpha_2GCFNFC*(GCF_NFCD[t-1]/K_NFC[t-2]))*K_NFC[t-1]
  GCF_NFC[t] <<- (1-CR_NFC[t])*GCF_NFCD[t]
  beta_nfc[t] <<- alpha_0betaNFC + alpha_1betaNFC*tanh(P_NELECT[t]/P_ELEC[t])  + alpha_2betaNFC*(COST_ER[t-1]/E[t-1])
  GCF_NFCG[t] <<- beta_nfc[t]*GCF_NFC[t]
  GCF_NFCC[t] <<- (1-beta_nfc[t])*GCF_NFC[t]
  #XXX#
  GCF_NFCR[t] <<- GCF_NFCGR[t] + GCF_NFCCR[t]
  GCF_NFCGR[t] <<- GCF_NFCG[t]/P_P[t]
  GCF_NFCCR[t] <<- GCF_NFCC[t]/P_P[t]
  #XXX#
  LEND_NFCM[t] <<- RP_NFC[t] - GCF_NFC[t]
  DISC_NFC[t] <<- eta_NFCT*GDP[t-1]
  LEND_NFC[t] <<- LEND_NFCM[t] + DISC_NFC[t]
  #XXX#
  IBATR_NFC[t] <<- alpha_IBANFC*GO_P[t]
  EQATR_NFC[t] <<- alpha_EQANFC*GO_P[t]
  EQLTR_NFC[t] <<- (1-(GO_PS[t]/GO[t]))*(EQATR_NMFI[t])
  IBLTR_NFC[t] <<- (IBATR_NFC[t] + EQATR_NFC[t] + RESTR_NFC[t]) - (LEND_NFC[t]+EQLTR_NFC[t])
  RESTR_NFC[t] <<- eta_NFCB*GDP[t-1]
  #XXX#
  OT_IBANFC[t] <<- delta_IBANFC*(IBA_NFC[t-1])
  OT_EQANFC[t] <<- OT_EQLNMFI[t]-(OT_EQAHH[t]+OT_EQAPS[t])
  OT_EQLNFC[t] <<- ((DIVP_NFC[t]/(r_IBLGVT[t]-beta_EQLNFC))-EQL_NFC[t-1])
  OT_IBLNFC[t] <<-   -DEF_NFC[t]*(IBL_NFC[t-1])
  DEF_NFC[t] <<- (def_max/(1+def_0NFC*exp(def_1-def_2*ILLIQ_NFC[t-1])))
  OT_RESNFC[t] <<- delta_RESNFC*(RES_NFC[t-1])
  #XXX#
  IBA_NFC[t] <<- IBA_NFC[t-1] + IBATR_NFC[t] + OT_IBANFC[t]
  EQA_NFC[t] <<- EQA_NFC[t-1] + EQATR_NFC[t] + OT_EQANFC[t]
  EQL_NFC[t] <<- EQL_NFC[t-1] + EQLTR_NFC[t] + OT_EQLNFC[t]
  IBL_NFC[t] <<- IBL_NFC[t-1] + IBLTR_NFC[t] + OT_IBLNFC[t]
  FA_NFC[t] <<- IBA_NFC[t] + EQA_NFC[t]   
  FL_NFC[t] <<- IBL_NFC[t] + EQL_NFC[t]
  FNW_NFCM[t] <<- FA_NFC[t] - FL_NFC[t]
  RES_NFC[t] <<- RES_NFC[t-1] + RESTR_NFC[t] + OT_RESNFC[t]
  FNW_NFC[t] <<- FNW_NFCM[t] + RES_NFC[t]
  #XXX#
  K_NFCR[t] <<- K_NFCCR[t] + K_NFCGR[t]
  K_NFCCR[t] <<- (1-delta_KP[t])*K_NFCCR[t-1]+GCF_NFCCR[t]
  K_NFCGR[t] <<- (1-delta_KP[t])*K_NFCGR[t-1]+GCF_NFCGR[t]
  K_NFC[t] <<- K_NFCC[t] + K_NFCG[t]
  K_NFCC[t] <<- K_NFCCR[t]*P_P[t]
  K_NFCG[t] <<- K_NFCGR[t]*P_P[t]
  NW_NFC[t] <<- FNW_NFC[t] + K_NFC[t]
  #XXX#

  LEV_NFC[t] <<- IBL_NFC[t]/K_NFC[t]
  ILLIQ_NFC[t] <<- (INTP_NFC[t]+INTAX_NFC[t]+DIVP_NFC[t]+GCF_NFC[t]+delta_KP[t]*K_NFC[t]+IBATR_NFC[t]+EQATR_NFC[t])/(GOS_P[t]+INTR_NFC[t]+DIVR_NFC[t]+EQLTR_NFC[t]+IBLTR_NFC[t])
  DSR_NFC[t] <<- ((YD_NFC[t]-delta_KP[t]*K_NFC[t-1]+INTP_NFC[t])/INTP_NFC[t])
  CR_NFC[t] <<- 1/(1+exp(-(alpha_0CRNFC + alpha_1CRNFC*CR_NFC[t-1] -alpha_2CRNFC*DSR_NFC[t-1] + alpha_3CRNFC*(FL_MFI[t-1]/FA_MFI[t-1]) )))
  
  #XX#Monetary financial Institutions
  LEND_MFIM[t] <<- INTR_MFI[t] - INTP_MFI[t]
  INTR_MFI[t] <<- INTP_NFC[t] + INTP_PS[t] + INTP_NMFI[t] + INTP_GVT[t]  + INTP_HH[t]
  INTP_MFI[t] <<-  INTR_NFC[t] + INTR_PS[t] + INTR_NMFI[t] + INTR_GVT[t] + INTR_HH[t]+ INTN_RoW[t] 
  DISC_MFI[t] <<- -(DISC_NFC[t] + DISC_NMFI[t] + DISC_GVT[t] + DISC_HH[t] + DISC_RoW[t])
  LEND_MFI[t] <<- LEND_MFIM[t] + DISC_MFI[t]
  #XXX#
  FA_MFI[t] <<- IBL_NFC[t] + IBL_PS[t] + IBL_NMFI[t] + IBL_GVTMFI[t] + IBL_HH[t]
  
  
  IBATR_MFI[t] <<- IBLTR_NFC[t] + IBLTR_PS[t] + IBLTR_NMFI[t] + IBLTR_GVTMFI[t] + IBLTR_HH[t]
  IBLTR_MFI[t] <<- IBATR_NFC[t] + IBATR_PS[t] + IBATR_NMFI[t] + IBATR_GVT[t] + IBATR_HH[t] + IBNTR_RoW[t]
  RESTR_MFI[t] <<- -(RESTR_HH[t] + RESTR_NFC[t] + RESTR_NMFI[t] + RESTR_PS[t] + RESTR_GVT[t] + RESTR_RoW[t])
  
  FL_MFI[t] <<- IBA_NFC[t] + IBA_PS[t] + IBA_NMFI[t] + IBA_GVT[t] + IBA_HH[t] + IBN_RoW[t]
  FNW_MFIM[t] <<- FA_MFI[t] - FL_MFI[t]
  RES_MFI[t] <<- - (RES_HH[t] + RES_NFC[t] + RES_NMFI[t] + RES_PS[t] + RES_GVT[t] + RES_RoW[t])
  FNW_MFI[t] <<- FNW_MFIM[t] + RES_MFI[t]
  MFI_GAP[t] <<- FNW_MFIT - (FNW_MFI[t]/FL_MFI[t])
  
  INTR_MFILR[t] <<- r_IBLNFCLR[t]*IBL_NFC[t-1] + r_IBLPSLR[t]*IBL_PS[t-1]  + r_IBLNMFILR[t]*IBL_NMFI[t-1]  + r_IBLGVT[t]*IBL_GVT[t-1]   +  r_IBLHHLR[t]*IBL_HH[t-1]  
  INTP_MFILR[t] <<- r_IBANFCLR[t]*IBA_NFC[t-1] + r_IBAPSLR[t]*IBA_PS[t-1]  + r_IBANMFILR[t]*IBA_NMFI[t-1]  + r_IBAGVTLR[t]*IBA_GVT[t-1]   +  r_IBAHHLR[t]*IBA_HH[t-1]  +  r_IBNRoWLR[t]*IBN_RoW[t-1]  + (2/3)*r_IBLGVT[t]*IBL_GVT[t-1]
  
  
  #XX#Non-monetary financial Institutions
  YD_NMFI[t] <<- (INTR_NMFI[t] + DIVR_NMFI[t]) - (INTP_NMFI[t]+DIVP_NMFI[t])
  INTR_NMFI[t] <<- r_IBLGVT[t]*IBL_GVTNMFI[t-1] + r_IBLGVTNMFIG[t]*IBL_GVTNMFIG[t-1] + r_IBANMFI[t]*IBA_NMFI[t-1]
  INTP_NMFI[t] <<- r_IBLNMFI[t]*IBL_NMFI[t-1]
  DIVR_NMFI[t] <<- DIVP_NFC[t] + DIVP_PS[t] - DIVN_RoW[t]
  DIVP_NMFI[t] <<- alpha_DIVPNMFI*(DIVR_NMFI[t] + INTR_NMFI[t] - INTP_NMFI[t])
  
  #XXX#
  PENSR[t] <<- alpha_PENSR*YD_NMFI[t-1]*(PENS[t-1]/(PENS[t-1]+INS[t-1]))
  INSR[t] <<-  alpha_INSR*YD_NMFI[t-1]*(INS[t-1]/(PENS[t-1]+INS[t-1]))
  SOCC_NMFI[t] <<- PENSR[t]  + alpha_SOCCW*W[t]
  SOCB_NMFI[t] <<- alpha_SOCBPENS*PENS[t-1]
  PENS_ADJ[t] <<- SOCC_NMFI[t] - SOCB_NMFI[t]
  LEND_NMFIM[t] <<- YD_NMFI[t]  - INSR[t] - PENSR[t] + SOCC_NMFI[t] - SOCB_NMFI[t] -PENS_ADJ[t]
  DISC_NMFI[t] <<- eta_NMFIT*GDP[t]
  LEND_NMFI[t] <<- LEND_NMFIM[t] + DISC_NMFI[t]
  #XXX#
  IBATR_NMFI[t] <<- alpha_IBANMFI*GO[t]
  EQLTR_NMFI[t] <<- EQATR_NFC[t] + EQATR_PS[t] + EQATR_HH[t] + EQNTR_RoW[t]
  EQATR_NMFI[t] <<-  psi_EQNMFI*EQLTR_NMFI[t]
  IBLTR_NMFI[t] <<- (IBATR_NMFI[t] + EQATR_NMFI[t] + IBLTR_GVTNMFI[t] + IBLTR_GVTNMFIG[t] + RESTR_NMFI[t]) - (LEND_NMFI[t]+EQLTR_NMFI[t]+ PENSTR[t] + INSTR[t])
  RESTR_NMFI[t] <<- eta_NMFIB*GDP[t-1]
  #XXX#
  OT_IBANMFI[t] <<- delta_IBANMFI*(IBA_NMFI[t-1])
  OT_IBLNMFI[t] <<- delta_IBLNMFI*(IBL_NMFI[t-1])
  OT_EQANMFI[t] <<- OT_EQLNFC[t] + OT_EQLPS[t]
  
  OT_EQLNMFI[t] <<- max(0,((DIVP_NMFI[t]/(r_IBLGVT[t]+beta_EQLNMFI))-EQL_NMFI[t-1]))
  OT_PENS[t] <<- (OT_IBANMFI[t] + beta_IBLGVTNMFI*OT_IBLGVT[t] + OT_EQANMFI[t] - OT_IBLNMFI[t]- OT_EQLNMFI[t])*(PENS[t-1]/(PENS[t-1]+INS[t-1]))
  OT_INS[t] <<- (OT_IBANMFI[t] + beta_IBLGVTNMFI*OT_IBLGVT[t] + OT_EQANMFI[t] - OT_IBLNMFI[t]- OT_EQLNMFI[t])*(INS[t-1]/(PENS[t-1]+INS[t-1]))
  OT_RESNMFI[t] <<- delta_RESNMFI*(RES_NMFI[t-1])
  #XXX#
  IBA_NMFI[t] <<- IBA_NMFI[t-1] + IBATR_NMFI[t] + OT_IBANMFI[t]
  EQA_NMFI[t] <<- EQA_NMFI[t-1] + EQATR_NMFI[t] + OT_EQANMFI[t]
  IBL_NMFI[t] <<- IBL_NMFI[t-1] + IBLTR_NMFI[t] + OT_IBLNMFI[t]
  EQL_NMFI[t] <<- EQA_HH[t] + EQA_NFC[t] + EQA_PS[t] + EQN_RoW[t]
  FA_NMFI[t] <<- IBA_NMFI[t] + IBL_GVTNMFI[t] +IBL_GVTNMFIG[t] + EQA_NMFI[t]
  FL_NMFI[t] <<- IBL_NMFI[t] + EQL_NMFI[t] + PENS[t] + INS[t]
  FNW_NMFIM[t] <<- FA_NMFI[t] - FL_NMFI[t]
  RES_NMFI[t] <<- RES_NMFI[t-1] + RESTR_NMFI[t] + OT_RESNMFI[t]
  FNW_NMFI[t] <<- FNW_NMFIM[t] + RES_NMFI[t]
  
  #XX#Government
  YD_GVT[t] <<- (ITAX[t] + INTAX[t] + SOCC_GVT[t] + INTR_GVT[t]) - (SOCB_GVT[t]+INTP_GVT[t]) + max((GVT_ELECS[t-1])*GOS_PS[t], 0)
  ITAX[t] <<- ITAX_P[t] + ITAX_PS[t] 
  ITAX_P[t] <<- ITAXR_P[t]*GO_P[t] + ITAX_NELEC[t] 
  ITAX_NELEC[t] <<-  COV_ETSP[t]*P_ETS[t]*EMIS_NELEC[t]
  ITAXR_P[t] <<- ITAXR_P[t-1] - tau_gvt*(ITAXR_P[t-1] - ITAXR_PLR)
  COV_ETSP[t] <<- COV_ETSP[L]
  ITAX_PS[t] <<- ITAXR_PS[t]*GO_PS[t] + COV_ETSPS[t]*P_ETS[t]*EMIS_ELEC[t] 
  ITAXR_PS[t] <<- ITAXR_PS[t-1] - tau_gvt*(ITAXR_PS[t-1] - ITAXR_PSLR)
  #TO DO
  ITAX_PSFF[t] <<- ITAXR_PS[t]*GO_PS[t]*(1-beta_NFF[t]) + COV_ETSPS[t]*P_ETS[t]*EMIS_ELEC[t]
  ITAX_PSNFF[t] <<- ITAXR_PS[t]*GO_PS[t]*(beta_NFF[t])
  COV_ETSPS[t] <<- COV_ETSPS[L]
  P_ETS[t] <<- P_ETSRB[t]
  INTAX[t] <<- INTAX_NFC[t] + INTAX_HH[t]
  INTAX_NFC[t] <<- INTAXR_NFC[t]*W[t]
  INTAXR_NFC[t] <<- INTAXR_NFC[t-1] - tau_gvt*(INTAXR_NFC[t-1] - INTAXR_NFCLR)
  INTAX_HH[t] <<- INTAXR_HH[t]*W[t]
  INTAXR_HH[t] <<- INTAXR_HH[t-1] - tau_gvt*(INTAXR_HH[t-1] - INTAXR_HHLR)
  
  #XXX#
  INTR_GVT[t] <<- r_IBAGVT[t]*IBA_GVT[t-1]
  INTP_GVT[t] <<- r_IBLGVT[t]*IBL_GVT[t-1] + r_IBLGVTNMFIG[t]*IBL_GVTNMFIG[t-1]
  SOCC_GVT[t] <<- SOCCR_GVT[t]*W[t] 
  SOCCR_GVT[t] <<- SOCCR_GVT[t-1] - tau_gvt*(SOCCR_GVT[t-1] - SOCCR_GVTLR)
  SOCB_GVT[t] <<- (alpha_0SOCB + alpha_1SOCB*(SOCB_GVT[t-1]/GDP[t-1]) + alpha_2SOCB*ru[t])*GDP[t]
  #XXX#
  CONS_GVT[t] <<- W_PUB[t] + OCONS_GVT[t]
  OCONS_GVT[t] <<- alpha_OCONSGVT*GDP[t-1]
  GCF_GVT[t] <<- GCF_GVT[t-1]*GCF_GVTgr_BASE[t-L]*(P_P[t]/P_P[t-1])
  SPEND_GVTPS[t] <<-  if(isTRUE((t < GBE_END) && (((CF_NFF[t-1] *(K_PSNFFR[t-1]+K_GVTNFFR[t-1])) / E_ELEC[t-1]) < 1.1))){GVT_ENERGY*0.415*(P_P[t])+ GREEN_POWER*3.33*P_P[t] + POWER_SUB*1*P_P[t]} else{SPEND_GVTPS[t-1]*0.9}
  SPEND_GVT[t] <<- OCONS_GVT[t] + GCF_GVT[t] + SPEND_GVTPS[t] + SOCB_GVT[t]
  #TO DO
  beta_gvt[t] <<- beta_nfc[t]
  #TO DO
  GCF_GVTG[t] <<- beta_gvt[t]*GCF_GVT[t]
  GCF_GVTC[t] <<- (1-beta_gvt[t])*GCF_GVT[t]
  #XXX#
  CONS_GVTR[t] <<- CONS_GVT[t]/P_P[t]
  GCF_GVTR[t] <<- GCF_GVTGR[t] + GCF_GVTCR[t]
  GCF_GVTGR[t] <<- GCF_GVTG[t]/P_P[t]
  GCF_GVTCR[t] <<- GCF_GVTC[t]/P_P[t]
  SUBS_HH[t] <<- ((1/(1-HOUSING_SUB_RATE))-1)*beta_GCFHH[t]*(GCF_HHHI[t] + if(t>THIBAN){HIBAN*HSELL*(H_I[t-1]*C_HIENR[L]*P_P[t]) + if(t>THENBAN){HENBAN*HSELL*(H_EN[t-1]*C_HIEER[L])*P_P[t]}else{0}}else{0}) 
  #XXX#
  LEND_GVTM[t] <<- YD_GVT[t] - (SUBS_HH[t] + SUBS_PS[t] + W_PUB[t]+OCONS_GVT[t]+GCF_GVT[t]+if(GVT_INVEST==1){SPEND_GVTPS[t]}else{0})
  DISC_GVT[t] <<- eta_GVTT*GDP[t-1]
  LEND_GVT[t] <<- LEND_GVTM[t] + DISC_GVT[t]

  
  #XXX#
  IBATR_GVT[t] <<- alpha_IBAGVT*GO[t]
  IBLTR_GVT[t] <<- IBATR_GVT[t] + RESTR_GVT[t] - LEND_GVT[t] - IBLTR_GVTNMFIG[t] 
  IBLTR_GVTMFI[t] <<- beta_IBLGVTMFI*IBLTR_GVT[t]
  IBLTR_GVTNMFI[t] <<- beta_IBLGVTNMFI*IBLTR_GVT[t]
  IBLTR_GVTRoW[t] <<- beta_IBLGVTRoW*IBLTR_GVT[t]
  IBLTR_GVTNMFIG[t] <<- if(GREEN_BONDS==1){SPEND_GVTPS[t]}else{0}
  RESTR_GVT[t] <<- eta_GVTB*GDP[t-1]
  #XXX#
  OT_IBAGVT[t] <<- delta_IBAGVT*(IBA_GVT[t-1])
  OT_IBLGVT[t] <<- delta_IBLGVT*(IBL_GVT[t-1])
  OT_IBLGVTNMFIG[t] <<- delta_IBLGVT*(IBL_GVTNMFIG[t-1])
  OT_RESGVT[t] <<- delta_RESGVT*(RES_GVT[t-1])
  #XXX#
  IBA_GVT[t] <<- IBA_GVT[t-1] + IBATR_GVT[t] + OT_IBAGVT[t]
  IBL_GVT[t] <<- IBL_GVTMFI[t] + IBL_GVTNMFI[t] + IBL_GVTRoW[t] 
  IBL_GVTMFI[t] <<- IBL_GVTMFI[t-1] + IBLTR_GVTMFI[t] + beta_IBLGVTMFI*OT_IBLGVT[t]
  IBL_GVTNMFI[t] <<- IBL_GVTNMFI[t-1] + IBLTR_GVTNMFI[t] + beta_IBLGVTNMFI*OT_IBLGVT[t]
  IBL_GVTRoW[t] <<- IBL_GVTRoW[t-1] + IBLTR_GVTRoW[t] + beta_IBLGVTRoW*OT_IBLGVT[t]
  IBL_GVTNMFIG[t] <<- IBL_GVTNMFIG[t-1] + IBLTR_GVTNMFIG[t] + OT_IBLGVTNMFIG[t] 
  FA_GVT[t] <<- IBA_GVT[t] 
  FL_GVT[t] <<- IBL_GVT[t] + IBL_GVTNMFIG[t]
  FNW_GVTM[t] <<- FA_GVT[t] - FL_GVT[t]
  RES_GVT[t] <<- RES_GVT[t-1] + RESTR_GVT[t] + OT_RESGVT[t]
  FNW_GVT[t] <<- FNW_GVTM[t] + RES_GVT[t]
  #XXX#
  K_GVTR[t] <<- K_GVTCR[t] + K_GVTGR[t]
  K_GVTCR[t] <<- (1-delta_KP[t])*K_GVTCR[t-1]+GCF_GVTCR[t]
  K_GVTGR[t] <<- (1-delta_KP[t])*K_GVTGR[t-1]+GCF_GVTGR[t]
  K_GVT[t] <<- K_GVTC[t] + K_GVTG[t]
  K_GVTC[t] <<- K_GVTCR[t]*P_P[t]
  K_GVTG[t] <<- K_GVTGR[t]*P_P[t]
  K_GVTNFFR[t] <<- (1-delta_KPSNFF[t])*K_GVTNFFR[t-1]+if(GVT_INVEST==1){SPEND_GVTPS[t]/P_P[t]}else{0}
  K_GVTNFF[t] <<- K_GVTNFFR[t]*P_P[t]
  GVT_ELECS[t] <<-  min(1,((K_GVTNFFR[t]*CF_NFF[t])/E_ELEC[t])) 
  NW_GVT[t] <<- FNW_GVT[t] + K_GVT[t]
  
  
  #XX#Households
  YP_HH[t] <<- W[t] + (INTR_HH[t]+DIVR_HH[t]) - (INTP_HH[t])
  INTR_HH[t] <<- r_IBAHH[t]*IBA_HH[t-1]
  INTP_HH[t] <<- r_IBLHH[t]*IBL_HH[t-1]
  DIVR_HH[t] <<- beta_dhh*(EQA_HH[t]/(EQL_NMFI[t]-EQN_RoW[t]))*DIVP_NMFI[t]
  #XXX#
  YD_HH[t] <<- YP_HH[t] + (SOCB[t]) - (SOCC[t]+INTAX_HH[t]) 
  SOCC[t] <<- SOCC_NMFI[t] + SOCC_GVT[t]
  #To DO!
  SOCB[t] <<- SOCB_NMFI[t] + SOCB_GVT[t]
  #XXX#
  CONS_HH[t] <<- CONS_HHP[t] + CONS_HHPS[t]
  CONS_HHP[t] <<- exp(alpha_0CHHP + alpha_1CHHP*log(CONS_HHP[t-1])+alpha_2CHHP*log(YD_HH[t-1])+alpha_3CHHP*log(FA_HH[t-1]))
  CONS_HHPR[t] <<- CONS_HHP[t]/P_P[t]
  CONS_HHPS[t] <<- CONS_HHPSR[t]*P_ELEC[t]
  CONS_HHR[t] <<- CONS_HH[t]/P_P[t]
  CONS_HHPSR[t] <<- E_ELECH[t]  
  SAV_HH[t] <<- YD_HH[t] - CONS_HH[t]
  #XXX#
  GCF_HH[t] <<- GCF_HHNB[t] + GCF_HHHIS[t]
  GCF_HHNB[t] <<- exp(log(GCF_HHNB[t-1]) -epsilon_GCFNB *(log(GCF_HHNB[t-1]) +alpha_0GCFNB -alpha_1GCFNB*log(HVAL[t-1]) ) -delta_1GCFNB*diff(log(GCF_HHNB[(t-2):(t-1)])))
  GCF_HHHI[t] <<- alpha_HHHI*GDP[t-1]
  GCF_HHHIS[t] <<- GCF_HHHI[t] + SUBS_HH[t] + if(t>THIBAN){HIBAN*HSELL*(H_I[t-1]*C_HIENR[L]*P_P[t]) + if(t>THENBAN){HENBAN*HSELL*(H_EN[t-1]*C_HIEER[L])*P_P[t]}else{0}}else{0}
  GCF_HHR[t] <<-GCF_HH[t]/P_P[t]
  GCF_HHNBR[t] <<- GCF_HHNB[t]/P_P[t]
  GCF_HHHIR[t] <<- GCF_HHHI[t]/P_P[t] + if(t>THIBAN){HIBAN*HSELL*(H_I[t-1]*C_HIENR[L])}else{0} + if(t>THENBAN){HENBAN*HSELL*(H_EN[t-1]*C_HIEER[L])}else{0}
  #XXX#
  GCF_HHHIER[t] <<- (1/(1-HOUSING_SUB_RATE))*beta_GCFHH[t]*GCF_HHHIR[t] + if(t>THIBAN){HIBAN*HSELL*(H_I[t-1]*C_HIENR[L]) + if(t>THENBAN){HENBAN*HSELL*(H_EN[t-1]*C_HIEER[L])}else{0}}else{0}
  GCF_HHHINR[t] <<- GCF_HHHIR[t] - GCF_HHHIER[t]
  GCF_HHHIENR[t] <<- GCF_HHHIER[t]*(kappa_hie*H_I[t-1]/(kappa_hie*H_I[t-1]+H_EN[t-1])) + if(t>THIBAN){HIBAN*HSELL*(H_I[t-1]*C_HIENR[L])}else{0} 
  GCF_HHHIEER[t] <<- GCF_HHHIER[t] - GCF_HHHIENR[t] 
  beta_GCFHH[t] <<- alpha_0betaHH + TREND_betaHH*(t-L) +  alpha_1betaHH*(P_NELECT[t-1]-P_ELEC[t-1])
  #XXX#
  LEND_HHM[t] <<- SAV_HH[t] - GCF_HH[t] + SUBS_HH[t]  + INSR[t] + PENSR[t] +PENS_ADJ[t]
  DISC_HH[t] <<- eta_HHT*GDP[t-1]
  LEND_HH[t] <<- LEND_HHM[t] + DISC_HH[t]
  #XXX#
  IBATR_HH[t] <<-  LEND_HH[t] + IBLTR_HH[t] - (EQATR_HH[t]+RESTR_HH[t]+PENSTR[t]+INSTR[t])
  EQATR_HH[t] <<- -alpha_EQAHH*EQA_HH[t-1] 
  PENSTR[t] <<- PENS_ADJ[t] 
  INSTR[t] <<- INSR[t] -alpha_INSTR*INS[t-1]
  IBLTR_HH[t] <<- alpha_IBLTR*HVAL[t] 
  RESTR_HH[t] <<- eta_HHB*GDP[t-1] 
  #XXX#
  OT_IBAHH[t] <<- delta_IBAHH*(IBA_HH[t-1])
  OT_EQAHH[t] <<- beta_dhh*(EQA_HH[t-1]/(EQL_NMFI[t-1]-EQN_RoW[t-1]))*OT_EQLNMFI[t]
  OT_IBLHH[t] <<- delta_IBLHH*(IBL_HH[t-1])
  OT_RESHH[t] <<- delta_RESHH*(RES_HH[t-1])
  #XXX#
  IBA_HH[t] <<- IBA_HH[t-1] + IBATR_HH[t] + OT_IBAHH[t]
  EQA_HH[t] <<- EQA_HH[t-1] + EQATR_HH[t] + OT_EQAHH[t]
  PENS[t] <<- PENS[t-1] + PENSTR[t] + OT_PENS[t]
  INS[t] <<- INS[t-1] + INSTR[t] + OT_INS[t]
  IBL_HH[t] <<- IBL_HH[t-1] + IBLTR_HH[t] + OT_IBLHH[t]
  FA_HH[t] <<- IBA_HH[t] + EQA_HH[t] + PENS[t] + INS[t]
  FL_HH[t] <<- IBL_HH[t]
  FNW_HHM[t] <<- FA_HH[t] - FL_HH[t]
  RES_HH[t] <<- RES_HH[t-1] + RESTR_HH[t] + OT_RESHH[t]
  FNW_HH[t] <<- FNW_HHM[t] + RES_HH[t]
  #XXX#
  H[t] <<- H_I[t] + H_EN[t] + H_EE[t]
  HB[t] <<- alpha_HB*GCF_HHNBR[t]
  H_I[t] <<- max(H_I[t-1]-GCF_HHHIENR[t]/C_HIENR[t],0)
  H_EN[t] <<- max(H_EN[t-1] + (1-beta_HBE)*HB[t] + GCF_HHHIENR[t]/C_HIENR[t] - GCF_HHHIEER[t]/C_HIEER[t],0)
  H_EE[t] <<- H_EE[t-1]  + beta_HBE*HB[t] + GCF_HHHIEER[t]/C_HIEER[t]
  #XXX#
  C_HIENR[t] <<- (1-HOUSING_SUB*HOUSING_SUB_RATE)*C_HIENR[L]
  C_HIEER[t] <<- (1-HOUSING_SUB*HOUSING_SUB_RATE)* C_HIEER[L]
  #XXX#
  HVAL[t] <<- H[t]*P_H[t]
  P_H[t] <<-exp(log(P_H[t-1]/(LF[t-1]/H[t-1])) +  epsilon_PH*(alpha_0PH  + alpha_1PH*log(YD_HH[t-1]/LF[t-1])+alpha_2PH*log(IBL_HH[t-1]/LF[t-1]) - log((P_H[t-1]*H[t-1])/LF[t-1])))*(LF[t]/H[t])
  NW_HH[t] <<- FNW_HH[t] + HVAL[t]
  #XXX#
  
  #XX#Rest of the world
  YP_RoW[t] <<- IMP[t] - EXP[t]
  DY[t] <<- CONS[t] + GCF[t] + EXP[t]
  IMP[t] <<- exp(alpha_0IMP + alpha_1IMP*log(IMP[t-1]) + alpha_2IMP*log(DY[t-1]) + alpha_3IMP*log((beta_1IMP*GCF[t]+beta_2IMP*GCF_PS[t])/DY[t]) + alpha_4IMP*log(P_I[t]/P_P[t]) + delta_1IMP*diff(log(DY[(t-1):t])))

  EXP[t] <<- exp(alpha_0EXP  + alpha_1EXP*log(EXP[t-1]) + alpha_2EXP*log(RoW_DR[t-1]*P_F[t-1]) + alpha_3EXP*log(REER[t-1])+delta_1EXP*diff(log(RoW_DR[(t-1):t]*P_F[(t-1):t])))
  #XXX#
  RoW_DR[t] <<- RoW_Dg*RoW_DR[t-1]
  IMP_R[t] <<- IMP[t]/P_I[t]
  EXP_R[t] <<- EXP[t]/P_E[t]
  #XXX#
  ER[t] <<- ER[t-1]
  RoW_Pg[t] <<- (1.03 + (1.025 - 1.03) * min((t - L - 1) / max(T - 1, 1), 1))^(1/4) 
  P_F[t] <<- RoW_Pg[t]*P_F[t-1]
  P_E[t] <<- P_P[t]
  I_ADJ[t] <<- I_ADJ[t-1]
  P_I[t] <<- P_F[t]*ER[t]*I_ADJ[t]
  REER[t] <<- (P_E[t]/(ER[t]*P_F[t]))
  #XXX#
  LEND_RoWM[t] <<- YP_RoW[t] + INTN_RoW[t] + DIVN_RoW[t]
  INTN_RoW[t] <<- r_IBLGVT[t]*IBL_GVTRoW[t-1] + r_IBNRoW[t]*IBN_RoW[t-1]
  DIVN_RoW[t] <<- beta_DIVNRoW*EQN_RoW[t-1]
  #XXX#
  DISC_RoW[t] <<- eta_RoWT*GDP[t-1]
  LEND_RoW[t] <<- LEND_RoWM[t] + DISC_RoW[t]
  #XXX#
  IBNTR_RoW[t] <<- LEND_RoW[t] - (IBLTR_GVTRoW[t]+ EQNTR_RoW[t]+RESTR_RoW[t])
  EQNTR_RoW[t] <<- alpha_EQNTRRoW*YP_RoW[t] 
  RESTR_RoW[t] <<- eta_RoWB*GDP[t-1]
  #XXX#
  OT_IBARoW[t] <<- delta_IBARoW*(IBN_RoW[t-1])
  OT_EQNRoW[t] <<- delta_EQNRoW*(EQN_RoW[t-1])
  OT_RESRoW[t] <<-  delta_RESRoW*(RES_RoW[t-1])
  #XXX#
  IBN_RoW[t] <<- IBN_RoW[t-1] + IBNTR_RoW[t] + OT_IBARoW[t]
  EQN_RoW[t] <<- EQN_RoW[t-1] + EQNTR_RoW[t] + OT_EQNRoW[t]
  FNW_RoWM[t] <<- IBN_RoW[t] + EQN_RoW[t] + IBL_GVTRoW[t] 
  RES_RoW[t] <<- RES_RoW[t-1] + RESTR_RoW[t] + OT_RESRoW[t]
  FNW_RoW[t] <<- FNW_RoWM[t] + RES_RoW[t]
  
  #XX#Rates of return
  r_BOE[t] <<- exp(0 + log(r_BOE[t-1]) + epsilon_rboe*(alpha_rboe*log(max(0.01,INF_A[t-1]))-log(r_BOE[t-1])))
  r_BOEQ[t] <<- ((1+r_BOE[t])^(1/4))-1
  
  r_IBANFC[t] <<- r_IBANFC[t-1] + tau_ranfc*(r_IBANFCLR[t] - r_IBANFC[t-1])
  r_IBANFCLR[t] <<- max(minr_nfc, r_BOEQ[t]-spr_nfca)
  
  r_IBAPS[t] <<- r_IBAPS[t-1] + tau_raps*(r_IBAPSLR[t] - r_IBAPS[t-1])
  r_IBAPSLR[t] <<- max(minr_nfc, r_BOEQ[t]-spr_nfca)
  
  r_IBANMFI[t] <<- r_IBANMFI[t-1] + tau_ranmfi*(r_IBANMFILR[t] - r_IBANMFI[t-1])
  r_IBANMFILR[t] <<- max(minr_nmfi, r_BOEQ[t]-spr_nmfia)
  
  r_IBAGVT[t] <<- r_IBAGVT[t-1] + tau_ragvt*(r_IBAGVTLR[t] - r_IBAGVT[t-1])
  r_IBAGVTLR[t] <<- max(minr_gvt, r_BOEQ[t]-spr_gvta)
  
  r_IBAHH[t] <<- r_IBAHH[t-1] + tau_rahh*(r_IBAHHLR[t] - r_IBAHH[t-1])
  r_IBAHHLR[t] <<- max(minr_hh, r_BOEQ[t]-spr_hha)
  
  
  r_IBNRoW[t] <<- r_IBNRoW[t-1] + tau_rnrow*(r_IBNRoWLR[t] - r_IBNRoW[t-1])
  r_IBNRoWLR[t] <<- max(minr_row, r_BOEQ[t]-spr_rowa)
  
  
  r_IBLNFC[t] <<- r_IBLNFC[t-1] + tau_rlnfc*(r_IBLNFCLR[t] - r_IBLNFC[t-1]) +delta_rlnfc*(diff(r_BOEQ[(t-1):t]))
  r_IBLNFCLR[t] <<- r_IBANFCLR[t] + (spr_nfcl+DEF_NFC[t])*(1+sigma_nfc*r_BOEQ[t])*(FL_MFI[t-1]/FA_MFI[t-1])
  
  r_IBLPS[t] <<- r_IBLPS[t-1] + tau_rlps*( r_IBLPSLR[t] - r_IBLPS[t-1] ) +delta_rlps*(diff(r_BOEQ[(t-1):t]))
  r_IBLPSLR[t] <<- r_IBAPSLR[t] + (spr_psl+DEF_PS[t])*(1+sigma_ps*r_BOEQ[t])*(FL_MFI[t-1]/FA_MFI[t-1])
  
  r_IBLNMFI[t] <<- r_IBLNMFI[t-1] + tau_rlnmfi*( r_IBLNMFILR[t] - r_IBLNMFI[t-1] ) +delta_rlnmfi*(diff(r_BOEQ[(t-1):t]))
  r_IBLNMFILR[t] <<- r_IBANMFILR[t] + (spr_nmfil-delta_IBLNMFI)*(1+sigma_nmfi*r_BOEQ[t])*(FL_MFI[t-1]/FA_MFI[t-1])
  
  r_IBLGVT[t] <<- r_IBLGVT[t-1] + tau_rlgvt*(r_IBLGVTLR[t] - r_IBLGVT[t-1] ) +delta_rlgvt*(diff(r_BOEQ[(t-1):t]))
  r_IBLGVTLR[t] <<- r_IBAGVTLR[t] + (spr_gvtl-delta_IBLGVT)*(1+sigma_gvt*r_BOEQ[t])*(FL_MFI[t-1]/FA_MFI[t-1])
  r_IBLGVTNMFIG[t] <<- sh_rGVTNMFIG*(r_IBLGVT[t]-r_BOEQ[t]) + r_BOEQ[t]
  
  r_IBLHH[t] <<- r_IBLHH[t-1] + tau_rlhh*( r_IBLHHLR[t] - r_IBLHH[t-1] ) 
  r_IBLHHLR[t] <<-r_IBAHHLR[t] + (spr_hhl-delta_IBLHH)*(1+sigma_hh*r_BOEQ[t])*(FL_MFI[t-1]/FA_MFI[t-1])

  #XX#Baseline variables
  POP_OBR[t] <<- Pop_BASE[t-L]
  P_ETSRB[t] <<- P_ETS[L] + g_ETSB*(t-L)
  GDP_ROBR[t] <<- GDP_ROBR[t-1]*GDP_rgOBR_BASE[t-L]
  
  
  #XX#SFC Checks
  LEND_M[t] <<- LEND_NFCM[t]  + LEND_PS[t] + LEND_MFIM[t] + LEND_NMFIM[t] + LEND_HHM[t] + LEND_GVTM[t] + LEND_RoWM[t]
  LEND[t] <<- LEND_NFC[t] + LEND_PS[t] + LEND_MFI[t] + LEND_NMFI[t] + LEND_HH[t] + LEND_GVT[t] + LEND_RoW[t]
  FNW_M[t] <<- FNW_NFCM[t] + FNW_MFIM[t] + FNW_NMFIM[t] + FNW_PSM[t] +FNW_HHM[t] + FNW_GVTM[t] + FNW_RoWM[t]
  FNW[t] <<- FNW_NFC[t] + FNW_MFI[t] + FNW_NMFI[t] + FNW_PS[t] +FNW_HH[t] + FNW_GVT[t] + FNW_RoW[t]
  
  #XX#Initialising variables
  MAAS_ADJ[t] <<- NA
  
  #XX#Plotting Variables
  GDPPLOT_R[t] <<- GDP_R[t]*4
  EXPGDPPLOT_R[t] <<- (EXP_R[t]/GDP_R[t])*100
  GDPGPLOT_R[t] <<- GDP_R[t]/GDP_R[t-1]
  BETA_ELECPLOT[t] <<- (beta_NFF[t])*100
  DEBT_GDP[t] <<- (FL_GVT[t]/(GDP_ADJ[t]*4))*100
  NETDEBT_GDP[t] <<- ((FL_GVT[t]-(K_GVT[t]+K_GVTNFF[t]+FA_GVT[t]))/(GDP_ADJ[t]*4))*100
  W_SPLOT[t] <<- W_S[t]*100
  DEF_GDP[t] <<- (-LEND_GVTM[t]/GDP_ADJ[t])*100
  P_ETSPLOT[t] <<- P_ETS[t]*1000
  EMISPLOT[t] <<- EMIS[t]*4
  GCF_PSNFFRPLOT[t] <<- GCF_PSNFFR[t]*4 + if(GREEN_BONDS==1){(SPEND_GVTPS[t]/P_P[t])*4}else{0}
  GCF_NFFTOTPLOT[t] <<- (GCF_PSNFFR[t] + SPEND_GVTPS[t]/P_P[t])*4
  GCF_HHHIERPLOT[t] <<- GCF_HHHIER[t]*4
  UPLOT[t] <<- ru[t]*100
  GCF_GRPLOT[t] <<- (GCF_HHHIER[t] + GCF_NFCGR[t] + GCF_GVTGR[t] + if(GVT_INVEST==1){SPEND_GVTPS[t]/P_P[t]}else{0})*4
  DEF_NFCPLOT[t] <<- (DEF_NFC[t])*100*4
  DEF_PSPLOT[t] <<- (DEF_PS[t])*100*4
  r_BOEPLOT[t] <<- r_BOE[t]*100
  CR_PSPLOT[t] <<- CR_PS[t]*100
  CR_NFCPLOT[t] <<- CR_NFC[t]*100
  INFPLOT[t] <<-INF_A[t]*100
  FNW_GVTR[t] <<- FNW_GVT[t]/P[t]
  FNW_MFIR[t] <<- FNW_MFI[t]/P[t]
  FNW_NMFIR[t] <<- FNW_NMFI[t]/P[t]
  FNW_RoWR[t] <<- FNW_RoW[t]/P[t]
  GDP_RgPLOT[t] <<- (((mean(GDP_R[(t-3):t]/GDP_R[(t-4):(t-1)]))^4)-1)*100
  GCFPLOT_R[t] <<- GCF_R[t]*4
  CONSPLOT_R[t] <<- CONS_R[t]*4
  EPLOT[t] <<- E[t]*4
}



```

## Parameters and Initial Values

```{r}
Parameters_InitialValues<-function(){
  
  #####
  #Free 
  #####
  epsilon_GDP <<- (ea$GDP[L]/1000)/GDP[L] #Adjustment factor to GDP in order to compare model GDP with data based GDP ##Calculated from initial data
  beta_IBLGVTMFI <<- 1/3 #Proportion of government borrowing held by the MFI sector ##Based on ON experimental flow of funds data 2020 and assumed constant in simulations
  beta_IBLGVTNMFI <<- 1/3 #Proportion of government borrowing held by the NMFI sector ##Based on ON experimental flow of funds data 2020 and assumed constant in simulations 
  beta_IBLGVTRoW <<- 1/3 #Proportion of government borrowing held by the RoW sector ##Based on ON experimental flow of funds data 2020 and assumed constant in simulations
  E[1:L] <<- mydata$ENERGY_TOTAL[1:L] #Total final energy use (TwH)##Taken from ONS DUKES table 1.1.5
  E_H[1:L] <<- mydata$ENERGY_HH[1:L] #Total final domestic energy use (TwH)##Taken from ONS DUKES table 1.1.5
  E_ELECH[1:L] <<- mydata$ENERGY_HH_ELEC[1:L] #Total domestic final electricity use (TwH)##Taken from ONS DUKES table 1.1.5
  E_ELEC[1:L] <<- mydata$ENERGY_TOTAL_ELEC[1:L] #Total final electricity use (TwH)##Taken from ONS DUKES table 1.1.5
  E_ELECNFF[1:L] <<- E_ELEC[1:L]*mydata$PROP_NFF_SUPPLY[1:L] #Total final electricity use from non-fossil fuel sources (TwH)##Calculated from non-fossil fuel energy supply proportions from UK energy trends table 5.1
  beta_ELECH <<- 0.205 #Proportion of electric energy use in total energy use for non-electric houses##Calculated from UK EPC data
  theta_HI <<-  5.606526#Energy intensity of inefficient housing stock ##Calculated from UK EPC data
  EMIS[1:L] <<-mydata$EMIS_TOTAL[1:L] #Total greenhouse gas emissions (MtCO2e)##Taken from DESNZ final greenhouse gas emissions table 1.2
  EMIS_ELEC[1:L] <<-mydata$EMIS_ELEC[1:L] #Total greenhouse gas emissions from electricty (MtCO2e)##Taken from DESNZ final greenhouse gas emissions table 1.2
  epsilon_min <<- 0.1 #Minimum energy intensity of production ##Selected such that it is reasonably higher than 0
  epsilon_max <<- 2 #Maximum energy intensity of production ##Selected as a reasonable maximum value based on UK past data
  kappa_1 <<- 40 #Scaling parameter governing the sensitivity of energy intensity to the green/conventional non-electric capital ratio; higher values mean energy intensity responds more sharply to capital composition##Calibrated such that the model generates the baseline scenario
  CF_min <<- 0.6 #Lower bound of the logistic function for non-fossil fuel electricity capacity factor##Selected as a reasonable minimum value based on UK data
  CF_max <<- 2 #Upper bound of the non-fossil fuel electricity capacity factor##Selected as a reasonable maximum value based on UK data
  kappa_2 <<- 0.4 #Scaling parameter governing how strongly the non-fossil/fossil electricity ratio drives the non-fossil capacity factor; controls the speed of transition to higher utilisation
##Calibrated such that the model generates the baseline scenario
  kappa_3 <<- 2 #Scaling parameter governing the sensitivity of the electric/non-electric energy mix in production to green capital accumulation##Calibrated such that the model generates the baseline scenario
  omega_nemin <<- 0.225 #Minimum emission intensity of non-electric energy production ##Selected such that it is reasonably higher than 0
  omega_nemax <<- 1 #Maximum emission intensity of non-electric energy production ##Selected as a reasonable maximum value based on UK data
  kappa_4 <<- 20 #Scaling parameter governing the sensitivity of non-electric energy emission intensity to green/conventional capital composition; higher values mean emission intensity falls more sharply as green capital accumulates##Calibrated such that the model generates the baseline scenario
  omega_emin <<- 0.3 #Minimum emission intensity of electric fossil fuel based energy production ##Selected such that it is reasonably higher than 0
  omega_emax <<- 0.8 #Maximum emission intensity of electric fossil fuel based energy production ##Selected as a reasonable maximum value based on UK data
  kappa_5 <<- 0.5#Scaling parameter governing the sensitivity of fossil fuel electricity emission intensity to the green/conventional capital ratio; controls how quickly fossil generators become cleaner as non-fossil capital expands##Calibrated such that the model generates the baseline scenario
  LF[1:L] <<- lms$EMP_FE[1:L]/1000 #Labour force (millions)##Taken from the ONS labour market survey 2023
  u[1:L] <<- mydata$u_K[1:L] #Rate of capital capacity utilisation##Based on data from the directorate General for Economic and Financial Affairs - 2021 and 2022 extrapolated
  u_T <<- mean(u[1:(L-8)]) #Target capacity utilisation ##Taken as the mean of past utilisation values
  re[1:L] <<- {x <- lms$EMP[1:L]/lms$EMP_FE[1:L]; gr <- mean(diff(x[(L-4):L])/x[(L-4):(L-1)]); x[(L-3):L] <- x[L-4] * (1+gr)^(1:4); x} #Rate of employment##Taken from the ONS labour market survey 2023
  EMP[1:L] <<- lms$EMP[1:L]/1000 #Total employed people (millions)##Taken from the ONS labour market survey 2023
  EMP_PUB[1:L] <<- lms$EMP_GVT[1:L]/1000 #Total employed people in the public sector (millions)##Taken from the ONS labour market survey 2023
  W[1:L] <<- {x <- (ea$WAGES[1:L] + ea$MI[1:L])/1000; gr <- mean(diff(x[(L-4):L])/x[(L-4):(L-1)]); x[(L-3):L] <- x[L-4] * (1+gr)^(1:4); x} #Total wages including mixed income (£ billion) ##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024
  W_PUB[1:L] <<- {x <- bbfq$WAGES_GVT[1:L]/1000; gr <- mean(diff(x[(L-4):L])/x[(L-4):(L-1)]); x[(L-3):L] <- x[L-4] * (1+gr)^(1:4); x} #Total public wages (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK blue book accounts 2023 - converted to quarterly data using cubic spline interpolation
  IC_PP[1:L] <<- mydata$INTCONS_PROD_PROD[1:L]/1000 -IMP[1:L] #Internal intermediate consumption of the production sector ##Taken from the ONS supply and use tables 2024
  IC_PPR[1:L] <<- IC_PP[1:L]/P_P[1:L] #Real internal intermediate consumption of the production sector ##Calculated from Eq. (IC_PPR)
  IC_PPS[1:L] <<- (mydata$INTCONS_PROD_PS[1:L]/1000) #Intermediate consumption of the power sector for production products ##Taken from the ONS supply and use tables 2024
  IC_FUELPS[1:L] <<- (mydata$INTCONS_FUEL_PS[1:L]/1000) #Intermediate consumption of the power sector for fuel products##Taken from the ONS supply and use tables 2024
  IC_PSP[1:L] <<- P_ELEC[1:L]*E_ELECP[1:L] #Intermediate consumption of the production sector for power sector products##Taken from the ONS supply and use tables 2024
  IC_PSPS[1:L] <<- mydata$INTCONS_PS_PS[1:L]/1000 #Internal intermediate consumption of the power sector ##Taken from the ONS supply and use tables 2024
  EXP[1:L] <<- {x <- ea$EXP[1:L]/1000; gr <- mean(diff(x[(L-4):L])/x[(L-4):(L-1)]); x[(L-3):L] <- x[L-4] * (1+gr)^(1:4); x}#Total Exports (£ billion) ##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024
  IMP[1:L] <<- {x <- ea$IMP[1:L]/1000; gr <- mean(diff(x[(L-4):L])/x[(L-4):(L-1)]); x[(L-3):L] <- x[L-4] * (1+gr)^(1:4); x}#Total Imports (£ billion) ##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024
  GCF_HH[1:L] <<- ea$GCF_HH[1:L]/1000#Gross capital formation of the household sector (£ billion) ##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024
  GCF_GVT[1:L] <<- ea$GCF_GVT[1:L]/1000#Gross capital formation of the government sector (£ billion)  ##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024
  alpha_PPLR <<- mean(alpha_PP[101:L]) #Long run technical coefficients of internal production intermediate consumption ##Taken as the average implied technical coefficient over past data
  alpha_PSPSLR <<- mean(alpha_PSPS[41:L]) #Long run technical coefficient of internal power sector intermediate consumption ##Taken as the average implied technical coefficient over past data
  alpha_OPPSLR <<- mean(alpha_OPPS[125:144]) #Long run technical coefficient of other inputs to the power sector ##Taken as the average implied technical coefficient over past data
  alpha_FUELPSLR <<- ((alpha_FUELPS[L])/(E_ELECFF[L]/E_ELEC[L])) #Long run technical coefficient of fuel input to the power sector ##Assumes fossil fuel electricity is output is proportional to fuel input and that at the initial condition fuel price is normalised to equal 1
  ITAX_PS[1:L] <<- {x <- mydata$INDTAX_PS[1:L]/1000; gr <- mean(diff(x[(L-4):L])/x[(L-4):(L-1)]); x[(L-3):L] <- x[L-4] * (1+gr)^(1:4); x}#Total indirect taxes - subsidies on the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS supply and use tables 2024
  ITAX_P[1:L] <<- {x <- (ea$INDTAX[1:L]-mydata$INDTAX_PS[1:L])/1000; gr <- mean(diff(x[(L-4):L])/x[(L-4):(L-1)]); x[(L-3):L] <- x[L-4] * (1+gr)^(1:4); x}#Total indirect taxes - subsidies on production (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024
  theta_psb <<- 0.02744239#Fixed share used to apportion NFC financial variables to the power sector##Based on the ratio of power sector to total NFC loans from Bank of England data
  INTR_PS[1:L] <<- ((ea$INTR_NFC[1:L] - ea$FISIM_DEP_NFC[1:L])*theta_psb)/1000 #Interest received by the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  INTP_PS[1:L] <<- ((ea$INTP_NFC[1:L] + ea$FISIM_LOANS_NFC)*theta_psb)/1000 #Interest paid by the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  IBA_PS[1:L] <<- ((ea$F2A_NFC[1:L] + ea$F3A_NFC[1:L] + ea$F4A_NFC[1:L])*theta_psb)/1000 #Interest bearing assets of the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  IBL_PS[1:L] <<- ((ea$F2L_NFC[1:L] + ea$F3L_NFC[1:L] + ea$F4L_NFC[1:L])*theta_psb)/1000 #Interest bearing liabilities of the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  EQA_PS[1:L] <<- ((ea$F5A_NFC[1:L])*theta_psb)/1000 #Equity assets of the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  EQL_PS[1:L] <<- ((ea$F5L_NFC[1:L])*theta_psb)/1000 #Equity liabilities of the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  DIVR_PS[1:L] <<- (ea$DIVR_NFC[1:L]*theta_psb)/1000#Dividends received by the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  DIVP_PS[1:L] <<- (ea$DIVP_NFC[1:L]*theta_psb)/1000#Dividends paid by the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  delta_KPSNFF[1:L] <<- c(NaN,(mydata$CC_PSR[2:L]/mydata$K_PS_R[1:(L-1)])) #Depreciation rate of power sector non-fossil capital ## Calculated from the ONS capital stock tables 2023
  delta_KPSFF[1:L] <<- c(NaN,(mydata$CC_PSR[2:L]/mydata$K_PS_R[1:(L-1)])) #Depreciation rate of power sector fossil capital ## Calculated from the ONS capital stock tables 2023
  K_PS[1:L] <<- ((mydata$K_PS[1:L])*mydata$GVA_PS_RAT[L])/1000 #Capital stock of the power sector(£ billion) ##Taken from the ONS capital stock tables 2023 assuming D351 capital is proportion to the sectors GVA in the supply and use tables 2023
  K_PSR[1:L] <<- ((mydata$K_PS_R[1:L])*mydata$GVA_PS_RAT[L])/1000 #Capital stock of the power sector 2022 prices (£ billion) ##Taken from the ONS capital stock tables 2023 assuming D351 capital is proportion to the sectors GVA in the supply and use tables 2023
  K_PSNFFR[1:L] <<- (K_PSR[1:L]*mydata$PROP_NFF_CAP[1:L]) #Non-fossil fuel capital stock of the power sector (£ billion) ##Calculated using DUKES table 5.7
  IBATR_PS[1:L] <<- ((ea$F2ATR_NFC[1:L]+ea$F3ATR_NFC[1:L]+ea$F4ATR_NFC[1:L])*theta_psb)/1000 #Interest bearing asset net-transfers of the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  IBLTR_PS[1:L] <<- ((ea$F2LTR_NFC[1:L]+ea$F3LTR_NFC[1:L]+ea$F4LTR_NFC[1:L])*theta_psb)/1000#Interest bearing liabilities net-transfers of the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  EQATR_PS[1:L] <<- ea$F5ATR_NFC[1:L]*(theta_psb/1000)  #Equity asset net-transfers of the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  EQLTR_PS[1:L] <<- ea$F5LTR_NFC[1:L]*(theta_psb/1000) #Equity liabilities net-transfers of the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  FNW_PS[1:L] <<- ea$FNW_NFC[1:L]*(theta_psb/1000)#Financial net-worth of the power sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 with the power sector accounting for a fixed proportion of NFC financial variables
  INTR_NFC[1:L] <<- ((ea$INTR_NFC[1:L] - ea$FISIM_DEP_NFC[1:L])*(1-theta_psb))/1000 #Interest received by the NFC sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024 
  INTP_NFC[1:L] <<- ((ea$INTP_NFC[1:L] + ea$FISIM_LOANS_NFC)*(1-theta_psb))/1000#Interest paid by the NFC sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024
  INTAX_NFC[1:L] <<- ea$INCTAX_NFC[1:L]/1000#Income tax paid by the NFC sector (£ billion)##Taken from the ONS UK economic accounts 2024
```
