```{r}
Latex_code <- capture.output(print(Latex_table_parameters,  include.rownames = FALSE, sanitize.colnames.function = function(x) paste0("\\textbf{", x, "}"), type = "latex"))
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\verb\\|([^|]+)\\|", "\\1", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("_(\\w+)", "_{\\1}", Latex_code, perl=TRUE)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\^(\\w+)", "^{\\1}", Latex_code, perl=TRUE)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\\\$", "\\$", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\\\_", "_", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("(\\w+_\\{\\w+\\})", "\\$\\1\\$", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("(\\w+\\^\\{[^}]+\\})", "\\$\\1\\$", Latex_code)
Latex_code<-gsub("\\$\\$", "\\$", Latex_code)

for (greek in greek_letters) {
  Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("\\$(.*?)\\$", "(?<![a-zA-Z0-9])", greek, "(?![a-zA-Z0-9])"), 
                     paste0("\\$", "\\\\", greek, "\\$", "\\1"), Latex_code, ignore.case = TRUE, perl = TRUE)
  Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(_)([a-zA-Z0-9]+)"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek, "_{\\3}"), Latex_code)
  Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(_\\{)([a-zA-Z0-9]+)(\\})"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek, "_{\\3}"), Latex_code)
  Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\b\\\\eta", "\\\\beta", Latex_code)
  Latex_code <- gsub("th\\\\eta", "\\theta", Latex_code)
  Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=\\s)"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
  Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=[A-Z])"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek, " "), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
  Latex_code <- gsub(paste0("(", greek, ")(?=\\$)"), 
                     paste0("\\\\", greek), Latex_code, perl = TRUE)
}

# Remove table wrapper and convert to longtable
Latex_code <- Latex_code[!grepl("\\\\begin\\{table\\}|\\\\end\\{table\\}|\\[ht\\]|^\\s*$", Latex_code)]
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\begin\\{tabular\\}\\{lllll\\}", "\\\\begin{longtable}{p{2cm}p{4.5cm}p{2cm}p{2cm}p{4.5cm}}", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\begin\\{tabular\\}", "\\\\begin{longtable}", Latex_code)
Latex_code <- gsub("\\\\end\\{tabular\\}", "\\\\end{longtable}", Latex_code)

# Find the header row (contains \textbf) and add longtable repeat commands
header_idx <- grep("\\\\textbf", Latex_code)[1]
if (!is.na(header_idx)) {
  header_row <- Latex_code[header_idx]
  # Add strut for vertical spacing in header row
  header_row_spaced <- gsub("^(\\\\textbf)", "\\\\rule{0pt}{14pt}\\1", header_row)
  # Insert longtable header commands after the header row
  # Format: \hline, header row, \hline for continuation pages
  longtable_header_cmds <- c(
    "\\endfirsthead",
    "\\hline",
    header_row_spaced,
    "\\hline",
    "\\endhead",
    "\\hline",
    "\\endfoot",
    "\\hline",
    "\\endlastfoot"
  )
  # Insert after the header row and its following \hline
  if (grepl("\\\\hline", Latex_code[header_idx + 1])) {
    insert_pos <- header_idx + 1
  } else {
    insert_pos <- header_idx
  }
  Latex_code <- c(Latex_code[1:insert_pos], longtable_header_cmds, Latex_code[(insert_pos+1):length(Latex_code)])
}

Latex_preamble <- "
\\documentclass{article}
\\usepackage[a4paper, left=1.5cm, right=1.5cm, top=2.5cm, bottom=2.5cm]{geometry}
\\usepackage{longtable}
\\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\\usepackage{lastpage}
\\renewcommand{\\arraystretch}{1.3}

\\pagestyle{fancy}
\\fancyhf{}
\\fancyhead[L]{\\textbf{UK SFC Model -- Model Parameters}}
\\fancyhead[R]{\\thepage\\ of \\pageref{LastPage}}
\\renewcommand{\\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\\renewcommand{\\footrulewidth}{0pt}

\\begin{document}
"
Latex_footer <- "
\\end{document}
"
Full_latex_code <- paste(Latex_preamble, paste(Latex_code, collapse = "\n"), Latex_footer, sep = "\n")
writeLines(Full_latex_code, file.path(dir_latex, "Latex_Table_parameters.tex"))
}
```

### LaTeX Equations

```{r}
if(latex==1){
Latex_code<-capture.output(Equations) 
latex_output <- character()
for (line in Latex_code) {
  if (grepl("#X#",line)) {
    title <- sub("#X#","",line)
    title <- trimws(title)
    latex_output <- c(latex_output,paste0("\\subsection{", title, "}"))
    next
  }
  
  # Detect and format SUBSECTION headers (e.g., ## 1.1.ENERGY ##)
  if (grepl("#XX#",line)) {
    title <- sub("#XX#","",line)
    title <- trimws(title)
    latex_output <- c(latex_output,paste0("\\subsubsection{", title, "}"))
    next
  }
  
  
  if (grepl("#XXX#",line)) {
    title <- sub("#XXX#","",line)
    title <- trimws(title)
    latex_output <- c(latex_output,paste0("\\"))
    next
  }
  
  
  # Process equations (lines with <<-)
  if (grepl("<<-", line)) {
    eq_line <- line
    # Convert R syntax to LaTeX (replicate your existing logic)
    eq_line <- gsub("<<-", "=", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("_(\\w+\\[t(-1)?\\])", "_{\\1}", eq_line, perl = TRUE)
    eq_line <- gsub("_(\\w+)", "_{\\1}", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("(\\w+)_\\{(\\w+)\\}(\\[t(-1)?\\])", "\\1_{\\2\\3}", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("(?<!\\{)\\[t\\](?!\\})", "_{[t]}", eq_line, perl = TRUE)
    eq_line <- gsub("(?<!\\{)\\[t-1\\](?!\\})", "_{[t-1]}", eq_line, perl = TRUE)
    eq_line <- gsub("exp\\(([^)]+)\\)", "e^{\\1}", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("([^=]+)=([^/]+)\\/([^\\s]+)", "\\1=\\frac{\\2}{\\3}", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("frac", "\\\\frac", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("\\\\frac\\{\\(([^)]+)\\)\\}\\{([^}]+)\\}", "\\\\frac{\\1}{\\2}", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("\\[t\\]", "t", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("\\[t-1\\]", "t-1", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("pmin", "min", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("pmax", "max", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("log\\((\\w+_\\{\\w+\\})\\)", "ln\\1", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("&", "\\\\&", eq_line)
    for (greek in greek_letters) {
      eq_line <- gsub(paste0("(?<!\\\\)\\b(", greek, ")(?=\\b|_)"), 
                      paste0("\\\\", greek), eq_line, perl = TRUE)
      eq_line <- gsub(paste0("\\\\", greek, "(?=[A-Z])"), 
                      paste0("\\\\", greek, " "), eq_line, perl = TRUE)
    }
    eq_line <- gsub("\\\\b\\\\eta", "\\\\beta", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("th\\\\eta", "\\\\theta", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("\\*", " ", eq_line)
    eq_line <- gsub("\\\\cdot", "", eq_line)
    
    # Generate LaTeX equation with label
    lhs <- strsplit(eq_line, "=")[[1]][1]
    lhs <- gsub("[[:space:]]", "", lhs)
    eq_with_label <- paste0(
      "\\begin{equation}\n", 
      "\\label{eq:", lhs, "}\n",
      eq_line, "\n", 
      "\\end{equation}"
    )
    latex_output <- c(latex_output, eq_with_label)
  }
  
}

for (greek in greek_letters) {
  latex_output <- gsub(
    paste0("eq:\\\\", greek), 
    paste0("eq:", greek), 
    latex_output, 
    ignore.case = TRUE
  )
}

latex_preamble <- "
\\documentclass{article}
\\usepackage{amsmath}
\\usepackage{amssymb}
\\usepackage[a4paper, left=2cm, right=2cm, top=2.5cm, bottom=2.5cm]{geometry}
\\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\\usepackage{lastpage}

\\pagestyle{fancy}
\\fancyhf{}
\\fancyhead[L]{\\textbf{UK SFC Model}}
\\fancyhead[C]{\\leftmark}
\\fancyhead[R]{\\thepage\\ of \\pageref{LastPage}}
\\fancyfoot[C]{Adam George}
\\renewcommand{\\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\\renewcommand{\\footrulewidth}{0.4pt}

\\begin{document}
\\section{UK SFC Model Equations}
"

latex_footer <- "
\\end{document}
"

final_latex <- paste(
  latex_preamble,
  paste(latex_output, collapse = "\n"),
  latex_footer,
  sep = "\n"
)

writeLines(final_latex, file.path(dir_latex, "Latex_Equations.tex"))
}
```

### LaTeX Baseline Table

```{r}
if(latex==1){

# Define baseline table rows: each entry is list(label, variable_expression, method)
# method: "m" = yearly mean, "s" = yearly sum
# variable_expression: a numeric vector of length L+T
baseline_rows <- list(
  list(label = "Real GDP growth (\\%)",
       data = GDP_RgPLOT,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Unemployment (\\%)",
       data = UPLOT,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Population (millions)",
       data = POP,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Labour Force (millions)",
       data = LF,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Proportion of non-fossil electricity generation (\\%)",
       data = BETA_ELECPLOT,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Total emissions ($MTCO_{2e}$/year)",
       data = EMISPLOT,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Emission price (\\pounds/$TCO_{2e}$)",
       data = P_ETSPLOT,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Green investment (\\% of GDP)",
       data = (GCF_GRPLOT / (GDP_R * 4)) * 100,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "NFC default rate (\\%)",
       data = DEF_NFCPLOT,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "NFC credit rationing (\\%)",
       data = CR_NFCPLOT,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Power Sector default rate (\\%)",
       data = DEF_PSPLOT,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Power Sector credit rationing (\\%)",
       data = CR_PSPLOT,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Imports (\\% of GDP)",
       data = (IMP_R / GDP_R) * 100,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Exports (\\% of GDP)",
       data = (EXP_R / GDP_R) * 100,
       method = "m"),
  list(label = "Real effective exchange rate (index, 2022 = 1)",
       data = REER,
       method = "m")
)

# Build the table rows
baseline_latex_rows <- sapply(baseline_rows, function(row) {
  if (row$method == "s") {
    vals <- yearly_baseline_s(row$data)
  } else {
    vals <- yearly_baseline_m(row$data)
  }
  paste0("     ", row$label,
         "   & ", formatC(round(vals[1], 2), format = "f", digits = 2),
         "   & ", formatC(round(vals[2], 2), format = "f", digits = 2),
         "   & ", formatC(round(vals[3], 2), format = "f", digits = 2),
         "   & ", formatC(round(vals[4], 2), format = "f", digits = 2),
         "   & ", formatC(round(vals[5], 2), format = "f", digits = 2),
         "  \\\\ ")
})

# Assemble the full LaTeX table
baseline_table <- paste0(
"\\begin{table}[H]
  \\centering
    \\caption{Key characteristics of the baseline scenario}
    \\label{Table:baseline}
  \\begin{tabular}{lccccc}
    \\hline
    \\textbf{Variable} & \\textbf{2025} & \\textbf{2030} & \\textbf{2040} & \\textbf{Mean} & \\textbf{St. deviation} \\\\ \\hline
", paste(baseline_latex_rows, collapse = "\n"),
" \\hline
  \\end{tabular}

  \\begin{tablenotes}
    \\footnotesize
    \\item \\textit{Notes}: All quarterly values are annualised and the mean and standard deviation are calculated from 2025-2040.
\\end{tablenotes}
\\end{table}")

writeLines(baseline_table, file.path(dir_latex, "Latex_Table_baseline.tex"))
}
```

```{r}
end_time <- Sys.time()
execution_time <- end_time - start_time
print(execution_time)
```
